                          AREA ||i.CRC8Calculate||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  CRC8Calculate PROC
;;;89     
;;;90     uint8_t CRC8Calculate(void *pBuf ,unsigned pBufSize)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;91     {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;92         uint8_t     retCRCValue = 0x00, *pData, i=0, pDataBuf=0;
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000008  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;93     
;;;94         pData=(unsigned char *)pBuf;
00000a  4613              MOV      r3,r2
;;;95         while(pBufSize--)
00000c  e014              B        |L1.56|
                  |L1.14|
;;;96         {
;;;97             pDataBuf=*pData++;
00000e  f8135b01          LDRB     r5,[r3],#1
;;;98             for(i=0;i<8;i++)
000012  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000014  e00e              B        |L1.52|
                  |L1.22|
;;;99             {
;;;100                if((retCRCValue^(pDataBuf))&0x01)
000016  ea800605          EOR      r6,r0,r5
00001a  f0060601          AND      r6,r6,#1
00001e  b12e              CBZ      r6,|L1.44|
;;;101                {
;;;102                    retCRCValue^=0x18;
000020  f0800018          EOR      r0,r0,#0x18
;;;103                    retCRCValue>>=1;
000024  1040              ASRS     r0,r0,#1
;;;104                    retCRCValue|=0x80;
000026  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
00002a  e000              B        |L1.46|
                  |L1.44|
;;;105                }
;;;106                else
;;;107                {
;;;108                    retCRCValue>>=1;
00002c  1040              ASRS     r0,r0,#1
                  |L1.46|
;;;109                }
;;;110                pDataBuf>>=1;
00002e  106d              ASRS     r5,r5,#1
000030  1c66              ADDS     r6,r4,#1              ;98
000032  b2f4              UXTB     r4,r6                 ;98
                  |L1.52|
000034  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;98
000036  dbee              BLT      |L1.22|
                  |L1.56|
000038  1e0e              SUBS     r6,r1,#0              ;95
00003a  f1a10101          SUB      r1,r1,#1              ;95
00003e  d1e6              BNE      |L1.14|
;;;111            }
;;;112        }
;;;113        return retCRCValue;
;;;114    }
000040  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;115    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.CalEdidCheckSum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  CalEdidCheckSum PROC
;;;115    
;;;116    iTE_u8 CalEdidCheckSum(iTE_u8 edid[],iTE_u8 block)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;117    {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;118        iTE_u16 i,sum,Checksum;
;;;119        sum=0;
000006  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;120        Checksum=0;
000008  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;121        if(block)
00000a  b14c              CBZ      r4,|L2.32|
;;;122        {
;;;123            for(i=0x80;i<0xFE;i++)  sum=sum+edid[i];
00000c  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
00000e  e004              B        |L2.26|
                  |L2.16|
000010  5c50              LDRB     r0,[r2,r1]
000012  4418              ADD      r0,r0,r3
000014  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
000016  1c48              ADDS     r0,r1,#1
000018  b281              UXTH     r1,r0
                  |L2.26|
00001a  29fe              CMP      r1,#0xfe
00001c  dbf8              BLT      |L2.16|
00001e  e008              B        |L2.50|
                  |L2.32|
;;;124        }
;;;125    
;;;126        else
;;;127        {
;;;128            for(i=0x00;i<0x7F;i++)  sum=sum+edid[i];
000020  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000022  e004              B        |L2.46|
                  |L2.36|
000024  5c50              LDRB     r0,[r2,r1]
000026  4418              ADD      r0,r0,r3
000028  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
00002a  1c48              ADDS     r0,r1,#1
00002c  b281              UXTH     r1,r0
                  |L2.46|
00002e  297f              CMP      r1,#0x7f
000030  dbf8              BLT      |L2.36|
                  |L2.50|
;;;129        }
;;;130        Checksum= 0x100- (sum & 0xFF);
000032  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000034  f5c07580          RSB      r5,r0,#0x100
;;;131        return Checksum;
000038  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
;;;132    }
00003a  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;133    
                          ENDP

;;;817        }
;;;818    }
000028  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;819    
                          ENDP

00002a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L3.44|
                          DCD      g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer
                  |L3.48|

                  FindChar PROC
;;;2004   
;;;2005   char *FindChar(char *buf,char Taildata,uint16_t Bitwide)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;2006   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;2007       //char MemberArr[4];
;;;2008   //  unsigned char Arrcur=0;
;;;2009       unsigned char bitcnt=0;
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;2010   
;;;2011       while(*buf!=Taildata)
000006  e006              B        |L5.22|
                  |L5.8|
;;;2012       {
;;;2013           buf++;
000008  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1
;;;2014           bitcnt++;
00000a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
00000c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
;;;2015           if(bitcnt>Bitwide)
00000e  4294              CMP      r4,r2
000010  dd01              BLE      |L5.22|
;;;2016               return 0;
000012  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L5.20|
;;;2017       }
;;;2018       return buf;
;;;2019   }
000014  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L5.22|
000016  7818              LDRB     r0,[r3,#0]            ;2011
000018  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;2011
00001a  d1f5              BNE      |L5.8|
00001c  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;2018
00001e  e7f9              B        |L5.20|
;;;2020   
                          ENDP

;;;2105           }
;;;2106           else
;;;2107               return 0;

;;;2108           buf++;
;;;2109           bitcnt++;
;;;2110           if(bitcnt>Bitwide)
;;;2111               return 0;
;;;2112       }
;;;2113       return bitcnt;
;;;2114   }

                  GetNumofStr PROC
;;;2068   /*在字符串中寻找数字 并返回数字 未找到返回-1*/
;;;2069   short GetNumofStr(char *buf,char Taildata,unsigned char Bitwide)

;;;2073       unsigned char bitcnt=0;
00000e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;2074   
;;;2075       while(*buf!=Taildata)
000010  e019              B        |L8.70|

;;;2076       {
;;;2077           if(*buf>='0'&&*buf<='9')

00001c  dc07              BGT      |L8.46|
;;;2078           {
;;;2079               MemberArr[Arrcur]=*buf;

;;;2080               Arrcur++;

000028  f00008ff          AND      r8,r0,#0xff
00002c  e003              B        |L8.54|
                  |L8.46|
;;;2081           }
;;;2082           else
;;;2083               return -1;
00002e  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L8.50|
;;;2084           buf++;
;;;2085           bitcnt++;
;;;2086           if(bitcnt>Bitwide)
;;;2087               return -1;
;;;2088       }
;;;2089       return StrToNum(MemberArr,bitcnt);
;;;2090   }

                  |L8.54|

000038  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;2085

00003c  42bd              CMP      r5,r7                 ;2086
00003e  dd02              BLE      |L8.70|
000040  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff        ;2087
000044  e7f5              B        |L8.50|
                  |L8.70|
000046  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2075
000048  42b0              CMP      r0,r6                 ;2075
00004a  d1e2              BNE      |L8.18|

000056  e7ec              B        |L8.50|
;;;2091   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HexAndAsciiChange||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HexAndAsciiChange PROC
;;;1787   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1788   u8 HexAndAsciiChange(u8 cvalue,u8 cmode)
000000  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1789   {
;;;1790       u8 reValue=0;
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1791   
;;;1792       if(cmode == 1)
000004  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000006  d119              BNE      |L9.60|
;;;1793       {
;;;1794           if((cvalue&0x0F)>=0&&(cvalue&0x0F)<=9)
000008  f002030f          AND      r3,r2,#0xf
00000c  2b00              CMP      r3,#0
00000e  db07              BLT      |L9.32|
000010  f002030f          AND      r3,r2,#0xf
000014  2b09              CMP      r3,#9
000016  dc03              BGT      |L9.32|
;;;1795           {
;;;1796               reValue=cvalue+'0';
000018  f1020330          ADD      r3,r2,#0x30
00001c  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
00001e  e026              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.32|
;;;1797           }
;;;1798           else if((cvalue&0x0F)>=0x0A&&(cvalue&0x0F)<=0x0F)
000020  f002030f          AND      r3,r2,#0xf
000024  2b0a              CMP      r3,#0xa
000026  db07              BLT      |L9.56|
000028  f002030f          AND      r3,r2,#0xf
00002c  2b0f              CMP      r3,#0xf
00002e  dc03              BGT      |L9.56|
;;;1799           {
;;;1800               reValue=cvalue-0x0A+'A';
000030  f1020337          ADD      r3,r2,#0x37
000034  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000036  e01a              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.56|
;;;1801           }
;;;1802           else
;;;1803           {
;;;1804               reValue=cvalue;
000038  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00003a  e018              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.60|
;;;1805               //printf("Change error: %x\n",cvalue);
;;;1806           }
;;;1807       }
;;;1808       else
;;;1809       {
;;;1810           if(((cvalue)>='0'&&(cvalue)<='9'))
00003c  2a30              CMP      r2,#0x30
00003e  db05              BLT      |L9.76|
000040  2a39              CMP      r2,#0x39
000042  dc03              BGT      |L9.76|
;;;1811           {
;;;1812               reValue=cvalue-'0';
000044  f1a20330          SUB      r3,r2,#0x30
000048  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
00004a  e010              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.76|
;;;1813           }
;;;1814           else if((cvalue)>='A'&&(cvalue)<='F')
00004c  2a41              CMP      r2,#0x41
00004e  db05              BLT      |L9.92|
000050  2a46              CMP      r2,#0x46
000052  dc03              BGT      |L9.92|
;;;1815           {
;;;1816               reValue=cvalue+0x0A-'A';
000054  f1a20337          SUB      r3,r2,#0x37
000058  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
00005a  e008              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.92|
;;;1817           }
;;;1818           else if((cvalue)>='a'&&(cvalue)<='f')
00005c  2a61              CMP      r2,#0x61
00005e  db05              BLT      |L9.108|
000060  2a66              CMP      r2,#0x66
000062  dc03              BGT      |L9.108|
;;;1819           {
;;;1820               reValue=cvalue+0x0A-'a';
000064  f1a20357          SUB      r3,r2,#0x57
000068  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
00006a  e000              B        |L9.110|
                  |L9.108|
;;;1821           }
;;;1822           else
;;;1823           {
;;;1824               reValue=cvalue;
00006c  4610              MOV      r0,r2
                  |L9.110|
;;;1825               //printf("Change error: %x\n",cvalue);
;;;1826           }
;;;1827       }
;;;1828   
;;;1829       return reValue;
;;;1830   }
00006e  4770              BX       lr
;;;1831   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.LimitedVSDBMaxPixel||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  LimitedVSDBMaxPixel PROC
;;;223    
;;;224    void LimitedVSDBMaxPixel(uint8_t* pEdidBlk1, uint8_t MaxPixelC)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;225    {
000002  460a              MOV      r2,r1
;;;226        uint8_t u8BlkTag = 0, u8BlkLen = 0, DTDoffset, offset = 4;
000004  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
000006  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000008  2104              MOVS     r1,#4
;;;227        bool bVSDBFind = FALSE;
00000a  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;228    
;;;229        DTDoffset = pEdidBlk1[2];
00000c  7884              LDRB     r4,[r0,#2]
;;;230    
;;;231        do
00000e  bf00              NOP      
                  |L10.16|
;;;232        {
;;;233            u8BlkTag = pEdidBlk1[offset]>>5;
000010  5c47              LDRB     r7,[r0,r1]
000012  117b              ASRS     r3,r7,#5
;;;234            u8BlkLen = pEdidBlk1[offset]&0x1F;
000014  5c47              LDRB     r7,[r0,r1]
000016  f007061f          AND      r6,r7,#0x1f
;;;235            if(u8BlkTag == 3)//VSDB block TAG
00001a  2b03              CMP      r3,#3
00001c  d101              BNE      |L10.34|
;;;236            {
;;;237                bVSDBFind = TRUE;
00001e  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
;;;238                break;
000020  e004              B        |L10.44|
                  |L10.34|
;;;239            }
;;;240            offset += (u8BlkLen+1);
000022  1c77              ADDS     r7,r6,#1
000024  440f              ADD      r7,r7,r1
000026  b2f9              UXTB     r1,r7
;;;241        }while(offset < DTDoffset);
000028  42a1              CMP      r1,r4
00002a  dbf1              BLT      |L10.16|
                  |L10.44|
00002c  bf00              NOP                            ;238
;;;242    
;;;243        if(bVSDBFind)
00002e  b12d              CBZ      r5,|L10.60|
;;;244        {
;;;245            #if (_EN_USE_REMOVE_EDID_DEEPCOLOR == _MACRO_ENABLE)
;;;246            if((pEdidBlk1[offset+6]&0xF0)!=0)
;;;247            {
;;;248                pEdidBlk1[offset+6] &= 0x0F;//remove Deepcolor
;;;249            }
;;;250            #endif
;;;251    
;;;252            if(pEdidBlk1[offset+7] > MaxPixelC)//max pixel clock
000030  1dcf              ADDS     r7,r1,#7
000032  5dc7              LDRB     r7,[r0,r7]
000034  4297              CMP      r7,r2
000036  dd01              BLE      |L10.60|
;;;253            {
;;;254                pEdidBlk1[offset+7] = MaxPixelC;
000038  1dcf              ADDS     r7,r1,#7
00003a  55c2              STRB     r2,[r0,r7]
                  |L10.60|
;;;255            }
;;;256        }
;;;257    }
00003c  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;258    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.NumToStr||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  NumToStr PROC
;;;2039   /*数字转换成字符buf 返回buf的字符个数*/
;;;2040   unsigned short NumToStr(char* buf,char* Str,unsigned char member)
000000  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;2041   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460b              MOV      r3,r1
000008  4615              MOV      r5,r2
;;;2042       unsigned char tempB=0,tempS=0,tempG=0;
00000a  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
00000c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00000e  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;2043       unsigned short i;
;;;2044       unsigned short strcursor=0;
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;2045       for(i=0;i<member;i++)
000012  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000014  e057              B        |L11.198|
                  |L11.22|
;;;2046       {
;;;2047           tempB=buf[i]/100;
000016  f814c001          LDRB     r12,[r4,r1]
00001a  f04f0864          MOV      r8,#0x64
00001e  fb9cfcf8          SDIV     r12,r12,r8
000022  f00c02ff          AND      r2,r12,#0xff
;;;2048           if(tempB)
000026  b152              CBZ      r2,|L11.62|
;;;2049           {
;;;2050               Str[strcursor++]=tempB+0x30;
000028  f1020c30          ADD      r12,r2,#0x30
00002c  f00c09ff          AND      r9,r12,#0xff
000030  4684              MOV      r12,r0
000032  f1000801          ADD      r8,r0,#1
000036  fa1ff088          UXTH     r0,r8
00003a  f803900c          STRB     r9,[r3,r12]
                  |L11.62|
;;;2051           }
;;;2052           tempS=buf[i]%100/10;
00003e  f814c001          LDRB     r12,[r4,r1]
000042  f04f0864          MOV      r8,#0x64
000046  fb9cf9f8          SDIV     r9,r12,r8
00004a  fb08cc19          MLS      r12,r8,r9,r12
00004e  f04f080a          MOV      r8,#0xa
000052  fb9cfcf8          SDIV     r12,r12,r8
000056  f00c06ff          AND      r6,r12,#0xff
;;;2053           if(tempS||tempB)
00005a  b906              CBNZ     r6,|L11.94|
00005c  b152              CBZ      r2,|L11.116|
                  |L11.94|
;;;2054           {
;;;2055               Str[strcursor++]=tempS+0x30;
00005e  f1060c30          ADD      r12,r6,#0x30
000062  f00c09ff          AND      r9,r12,#0xff
000066  4684              MOV      r12,r0
000068  f1000801          ADD      r8,r0,#1
00006c  fa1ff088          UXTH     r0,r8
000070  f803900c          STRB     r9,[r3,r12]
                  |L11.116|
;;;2056           }
;;;2057           tempG=buf[i]%10;
000074  f814c001          LDRB     r12,[r4,r1]
000078  f04f080a          MOV      r8,#0xa
00007c  fb9cf9f8          SDIV     r9,r12,r8
000080  fb08cc19          MLS      r12,r8,r9,r12
000084  f00c07ff          AND      r7,r12,#0xff
;;;2058           if(tempS||tempB||tempG)
000088  b90e              CBNZ     r6,|L11.142|
00008a  b902              CBNZ     r2,|L11.142|
00008c  b1bf              CBZ      r7,|L11.190|
                  |L11.142|
;;;2059           {
;;;2060               Str[strcursor++]=tempG+0x30;
00008e  f1070c30          ADD      r12,r7,#0x30
000092  f00c09ff          AND      r9,r12,#0xff
000096  4684              MOV      r12,r0
000098  f1000801          ADD      r8,r0,#1
00009c  fa1ff088          UXTH     r0,r8
0000a0  f803900c          STRB     r9,[r3,r12]
;;;2061               if(i+1<member)
0000a4  f1010c01          ADD      r12,r1,#1
0000a8  45ac              CMP      r12,r5
0000aa  da08              BGE      |L11.190|
;;;2062                   Str[strcursor++]=',';
0000ac  f04f092c          MOV      r9,#0x2c
0000b0  4684              MOV      r12,r0
0000b2  f1000801          ADD      r8,r0,#1
0000b6  fa1ff088          UXTH     r0,r8
0000ba  f803900c          STRB     r9,[r3,r12]
                  |L11.190|
0000be  f1010c01          ADD      r12,r1,#1             ;2045
0000c2  fa1ff18c          UXTH     r1,r12                ;2045
                  |L11.198|
0000c6  42a9              CMP      r1,r5                 ;2045
0000c8  dba5              BLT      |L11.22|
;;;2063           }
;;;2064       }
;;;2065       return strcursor;
;;;2066   }
0000ca  e8bd83f0          POP      {r4-r9,pc}
;;;2067   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.PlatformTimerExpired||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  PlatformTimerExpired PROC
;;;1915   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1916   uint8_t PlatformTimerExpired ( uint8_t timer )         //定时时间到函数
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;1917   {
;;;1918       if ( timer < etINVALID )
000002  2904              CMP      r1,#4
000004  da07              BGE      |L12.22|
;;;1919       {
;;;1920           return( gTimerCounters[ timer ] == 0);             //定时时间到时返回1
000006  4805              LDR      r0,|L12.28|
000008  f8500021          LDR      r0,[r0,r1,LSL #2]
00000c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L12.18|
00000e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L12.16|
;;;1921       }
;;;1922   
;;;1923       return( 0 );                                           //定时时间还没到时返回0
;;;1924   }
000010  4770              BX       lr
                  |L12.18|
000012  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1920
000014  e7fc              B        |L12.16|
                  |L12.22|
000016  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1923
000018  e7fa              B        |L12.16|
;;;1925   //========================================================================================
                          ENDP

00001a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L12.28|
                          DCD      gTimerCounters

                          AREA ||i.PlatformTimerGet||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  PlatformTimerGet PROC
;;;1874   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1875   u32 PlatformTimerGet(uint8_t eTimer)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;1876   {
;;;1877       return(gTimerCounters[eTimer]);
000002  4802              LDR      r0,|L13.12|
000004  f8500021          LDR      r0,[r0,r1,LSL #2]
;;;1878   }
000008  4770              BX       lr
;;;1879   
                          ENDP

00000a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L13.12|
                          DCD      gTimerCounters

                          AREA ||i.PlatformTimerInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  PlatformTimerInit PROC
;;;1883   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1884   void PlatformTimerInit (void)
000000  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1885   {
;;;1886       int i;
;;;1887       //initializer timer counters in array
;;;1888       for ( i = 0; i < etINVALID; i++ )
000002  e004              B        |L14.14|
                  |L14.4|
;;;1889       {
;;;1890           gTimerCounters[ i ] = 0;
000004  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000006  4a03              LDR      r2,|L14.20|
000008  f8421020          STR      r1,[r2,r0,LSL #2]
00000c  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;1888
                  |L14.14|
00000e  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;1888
000010  dbf8              BLT      |L14.4|
;;;1891       }
;;;1892   
;;;1893       //PlatformTimerSet(etKEY_Detect,5000);
;;;1894   }
000012  4770              BX       lr
;;;1895   
                          ENDP

                  |L14.20|
                          DCD      gTimerCounters

                          AREA ||i.PlatformTimerSet||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  PlatformTimerSet PROC
;;;1857   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1858   void PlatformTimerSet( uint8_t index, u32 m_sec )
000000  bf00              NOP      
;;;1859   {
;;;1860       switch ( index )
;;;1861       {
;;;1862           default:
;;;1863               if (index<etINVALID)
000002  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000004  da02              BGE      |L15.12|
;;;1864               {
;;;1865                   gTimerCounters[index] = m_sec;
000006  4a03              LDR      r2,|L15.20|
000008  f8421020          STR      r1,[r2,r0,LSL #2]
                  |L15.12|
;;;1866               }
;;;1867               break;
00000c  bf00              NOP      
00000e  bf00              NOP      
;;;1868       }
;;;1869   }
000010  4770              BX       lr
;;;1870   
                          ENDP

000012  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L15.20|
                          DCD      gTimerCounters

                          AREA ||i.PlatformTimerTask||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  PlatformTimerTask PROC
;;;1899   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1900   void PlatformTimerTask(void)
000000  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1901   {
;;;1902       int i;
;;;1903       for(i=0;i<etINVALID;i++)
000002  e00b              B        |L16.28|
                  |L16.4|
;;;1904       {
;;;1905           if(gTimerCounters[i] > 0)
000004  4907              LDR      r1,|L16.36|
000006  f8511020          LDR      r1,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
00000a  b131              CBZ      r1,|L16.26|
;;;1906           {
;;;1907               gTimerCounters[i]--;
00000c  4905              LDR      r1,|L16.36|
00000e  f8511020          LDR      r1,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
000012  1e49              SUBS     r1,r1,#1
000014  4a03              LDR      r2,|L16.36|
000016  f8421020          STR      r1,[r2,r0,LSL #2]
                  |L16.26|
00001a  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;1903
                  |L16.28|
00001c  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;1903
00001e  dbf1              BLT      |L16.4|
;;;1908           }
;;;1909       }
;;;1910   }
000020  4770              BX       lr
;;;1911   
                          ENDP

000022  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L16.36|
                          DCD      gTimerCounters

                          AREA ||i.SetUserData_EdidIndexSave||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  SetUserData_EdidIndexSave PROC
;;;675    
;;;676    void SetUserData_EdidIndexSave(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;677    {
;;;678        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4d05              LDR      r5,|L17.24|
;;;679        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  462e              MOV      r6,r5
;;;680        pstEdidSelIndex_t           pstEdidIndex = &pstPrjSaveVar->stEdidSelIndex;
000006  f106040b          ADD      r4,r6,#0xb
;;;681    
;;;682        #if _ENABLE_SAVE_CURRENT_EDID
;;;683        memcpy(pstEdidIndex->u8CurEdidbuf,g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer, 256);
;;;684        #endif
;;;685        pstEdidIndex->u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex, ((uint8_t *)&pstEdidIndex->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex));
00000a  1d60              ADDS     r0,r4,#5
00000c  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
00000e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000010  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000014  7160              STRB     r0,[r4,#5]
;;;686    
;;;687        #if (_EN_EEPROM_FUN_SAVE_SYS_EDID_INDEX==_MACRO_ENABLE)
;;;688        SaveUserDataToEep(eEepDataIndex_SysEdidIndex,(ADDR_EEPROM_USER_START+((uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex-(uint8_t *)pstPrjSaveVar)),(uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex,sizeof(stEdidSelIndex_t),TIME_SAVE_TO_EEPROM_IMMEDIATELY, FALSE);
;;;689        #endif
;;;690    }
000016  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;691    
                          ENDP

                  |L17.24|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.SetUserData_HDCP||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  SetUserData_HDCP PROC
;;;406    
;;;407    void SetUserData_HDCP(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;408    {
;;;409        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4d05              LDR      r5,|L18.24|
;;;410        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  462e              MOV      r6,r5
;;;411        pstHdcpStatusOutPort_t      pstHdcpStatusOp = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdcpStatusOp;
000006  f1060409          ADD      r4,r6,#9
;;;412    
;;;413        //pstHdcpStatusOp->u8HdcpSta[u8OutIndex] = u8HdcpState;
;;;414        pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp,((uint8_t *)&pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp));
00000a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
00000c  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
00000e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000010  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000014  7060              STRB     r0,[r4,#1]
;;;415    
;;;416    #if ((_EN_EEPROM_FUN_SAVE_HDCP_STATUS==_MACRO_ENABLE))
;;;417        SaveUserDataToEep(eEepDataIndex_HdcpStatus,(ADDR_EEPROM_USER_START+((uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp-(uint8_t *)pstPrjSaveVar)),(uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp,sizeof(stHdcpStatusOutPort_t),TIME_SAVE_TO_EEPROM_IMMEDIATELY, FALSE);
;;;418    #endif
;;;419    }
000016  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;420    
                          ENDP

                  |L18.24|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.SetUserData_HdmiSel||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  SetUserData_HdmiSel PROC
;;;328    #if 1//_ENABLE_MULTI_OUTPUT_CHIP
;;;329    void SetUserData_HdmiSel(void)
000000  b57c              PUSH     {r2-r6,lr}
;;;330    {
;;;331        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L19.48|
;;;332        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  4626              MOV      r6,r4
;;;333        pstHdmiSwitchParam_t        pstHdmiSw = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdmiSel;
000006  4635              MOV      r5,r6
;;;334    
;;;335        //pstHdmiSw->u8SwChannel = HdmiRxSel;
;;;336        //pstHdmiSw->bAutoSwitch = isAutoMode;
;;;337        pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw,((uint8_t *)&pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw));
000008  f1050008          ADD      r0,r5,#8
00000c  1b41              SUBS     r1,r0,r5
00000e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000010  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000014  7228              STRB     r0,[r5,#8]
;;;338    
;;;339        #if ((_EN_EEPROM_FUN_SAVE_HDMI_SEL==_MACRO_ENABLE)||(_EN_EEPROM_FUN_SAVE_TYPE_SWITCH_MODE==_MACRO_ENABLE))
;;;340        SaveUserDataToEep(eEepDataIndex_HdmiSel,(ADDR_EEPROM_USER_START+((uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw-(uint8_t *)pstPrjSaveVar)),(uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw,sizeof(stHdmiSwitchParam_t),TIME_SAVE_TO_EEPROM_IMMEDIATELY, FALSE);
000016  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000018  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00001a  e9cd1000          STRD     r1,r0,[sp,#0]
00001e  1ba8              SUBS     r0,r5,r6
000020  1c81              ADDS     r1,r0,#2
000022  2309              MOVS     r3,#9
000024  462a              MOV      r2,r5
000026  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000028  f7fffffe          BL       SaveUserDataToEep
;;;341        #endif
;;;342    }
00002c  bd7c              POP      {r2-r6,pc}
;;;343    #else
                          ENDP

00002e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L19.48|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.SetUserData_ProjectName||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  SetUserData_ProjectName PROC
;;;720    
;;;721    void SetUserData_ProjectName(char *strPrjName, uint8_t len)
000000  e92d41fc          PUSH     {r2-r8,lr}
;;;722    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;723        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000008  4e12              LDR      r6,|L20.84|
;;;724        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
00000a  46b0              MOV      r8,r6
;;;725        pstProjectNameSet_t         pstPrjNameSet = &pstPrjSaveVar->stPrjNameSet;
00000c  f1080411          ADD      r4,r8,#0x11
;;;726    
;;;727        memset(pstPrjNameSet->sPrjName, 0, SIZE_PRJ_NAME_CHARS_MAX);
000010  213c              MOVS     r1,#0x3c
000012  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000014  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;728        memcpy(pstPrjNameSet->sPrjName, strPrjName, len);
000018  462a              MOV      r2,r5
00001a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00001c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;729        pstPrjNameSet->m_u8Len = len;
000022  f884503c          STRB     r5,[r4,#0x3c]
;;;730    
;;;731        pstPrjNameSet->u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet, ((uint8_t *)&pstPrjNameSet->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet));
000026  f104003d          ADD      r0,r4,#0x3d
00002a  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000032  f884003d          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3d]
;;;732    
;;;733        SaveUserDataToEep(eEepDataIndex_ProjectName,(ADDR_EEPROM_USER_START+((uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet-(uint8_t *)pstPrjSaveVar)),(uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet,sizeof(stProjectNameSet_t),TIME_SAVE_TO_EEPROM_IMMEDIATELY, FALSE);
000036  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000038  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00003a  e9cd1000          STRD     r1,r0,[sp,#0]
00003e  eba40008          SUB      r0,r4,r8
000042  1c81              ADDS     r1,r0,#2
000044  233e              MOVS     r3,#0x3e
000046  4622              MOV      r2,r4
000048  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       SaveUserDataToEep
;;;734    }
00004e  e8bd81fc          POP      {r2-r8,pc}
;;;735    
                          ENDP

000052  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L20.84|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.StrToNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  StrToNum PROC
;;;2021   /*输入字符buf转成数字 返回数字*/
;;;2022   unsigned short StrToNum(char *Str,unsigned char cursor)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;2023   {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000004  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;2024       unsigned char i;
;;;2025       unsigned short Num=0;
000006  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;2026       for(i=0;i<10;i++)
000008  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00000a  e00d              B        |L21.40|
                  |L21.12|
;;;2027       {
;;;2028           if(i<cursor)
00000c  4299              CMP      r1,r3
00000e  da07              BGE      |L21.32|
;;;2029           {
;;;2030               //Num+=(Str[i]-0x30)*pow(10,cursor-1-i);
;;;2031               Num=Num*10+(Str[i]-0x30);
000010  5c54              LDRB     r4,[r2,r1]
000012  3c30              SUBS     r4,r4,#0x30
000014  eb000580          ADD      r5,r0,r0,LSL #2
000018  eb040445          ADD      r4,r4,r5,LSL #1
00001c  b2a0              UXTH     r0,r4
00001e  e001              B        |L21.36|
                  |L21.32|
;;;2032           }
;;;2033           else
;;;2034               Str[i]=' ';
000020  2420              MOVS     r4,#0x20
000022  5454              STRB     r4,[r2,r1]
                  |L21.36|
000024  1c4c              ADDS     r4,r1,#1              ;2026
000026  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4                 ;2026
                  |L21.40|
000028  290a              CMP      r1,#0xa               ;2026
00002a  dbef              BLT      |L21.12|
;;;2035       }
;;;2036       return Num;
;;;2037   }
00002c  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;2038   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.U16ToU8MsbCovert||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  U16ToU8MsbCovert PROC
;;;2245   
;;;2246   u16 U16ToU8MsbCovert(pu16 arry1,pu8 arry2,u16 u16Len)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;2247   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;2248   	u16 i;
;;;2249   	u16 l_u16RealLen=0;
000006  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;2250   
;;;2251   	for(i=0;i<u16Len;i++)
000008  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00000a  e00e              B        |L22.42|
                  |L22.12|
;;;2252   	{
;;;2253           arry2[l_u16RealLen++] = (arry1[i]>>8)&0xFF;
00000c  f8335011          LDRH     r5,[r3,r1,LSL #1]
000010  0a2f              LSRS     r7,r5,#8
000012  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000014  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
000016  b2b0              UXTH     r0,r6
000018  5567              STRB     r7,[r4,r5]
;;;2254           arry2[l_u16RealLen++] = (arry1[i])&0xFF;
00001a  f8137011          LDRB     r7,[r3,r1,LSL #1]
00001e  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000020  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
000022  b2b0              UXTH     r0,r6
000024  5567              STRB     r7,[r4,r5]
000026  1c4d              ADDS     r5,r1,#1              ;2251
000028  b2a9              UXTH     r1,r5                 ;2251
                  |L22.42|
00002a  4291              CMP      r1,r2                 ;2251
00002c  dbee              BLT      |L22.12|
;;;2255   	}
;;;2256   	return l_u16RealLen;
;;;2257   }
00002e  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;2258   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.U8ToU16MsbCovert||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  U8ToU16MsbCovert PROC
;;;2258   
;;;2259   u16 U8ToU16MsbCovert(pu8 arry1,pu16 arry2,u16 u16Len)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2260   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000004  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;2261   	u16 i;
;;;2262   	u16 l_u16RealLen=0;
000006  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;2263   
;;;2264   	for(i=0;i<u16Len;i=i+2)
000008  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
00000a  e00e              B        |L23.42|
                  |L23.12|
;;;2265   	{
;;;2266           arry2[l_u16RealLen] = arry1[i];
00000c  5c9d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r2]
00000e  f8215010          STRH     r5,[r1,r0,LSL #1]
;;;2267           arry2[l_u16RealLen] = (arry2[l_u16RealLen]<<8) | arry1[i+1];
000012  1c55              ADDS     r5,r2,#1
000014  5d5d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r5]
000016  f8116010          LDRB     r6,[r1,r0,LSL #1]
00001a  ea452506          ORR      r5,r5,r6,LSL #8
00001e  f8215010          STRH     r5,[r1,r0,LSL #1]
;;;2268           l_u16RealLen++;
000022  1c45              ADDS     r5,r0,#1
000024  b2a8              UXTH     r0,r5
000026  1c95              ADDS     r5,r2,#2              ;2264
000028  b2aa              UXTH     r2,r5                 ;2264
                  |L23.42|
00002a  42a2              CMP      r2,r4                 ;2264
00002c  dbee              BLT      |L23.12|
;;;2269   	}
;;;2270   	return l_u16RealLen;
;;;2271   }
00002e  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;2272   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.bubble_sort||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  bubble_sort PROC
;;;2117   //  mode = 0   low->high
;;;2118   void bubble_sort(u8* a, u8 n,u8 mode)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;2119   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000004  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;2120       u8 i, j, temp;
;;;2121       for (j = 0; j < n - 1; j++)
000006  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000008  e021              B        |L24.78|
                  |L24.10|
;;;2122           for (i = 0; i < n - 1 - j; i++)
00000a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000c  e019              B        |L24.66|
                  |L24.14|
;;;2123           {
;;;2124               if(!mode)
00000e  b95c              CBNZ     r4,|L24.40|
;;;2125               {
;;;2126                   if(a[i] > a[i + 1])
000010  5c1f              LDRB     r7,[r3,r0]
000012  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
000014  5d9e              LDRB     r6,[r3,r6]
000016  42b7              CMP      r7,r6
000018  dd11              BLE      |L24.62|
;;;2127                   {
;;;2128                       temp = a[i];
00001a  5c1d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r0]
;;;2129                       a[i] = a[i + 1];
00001c  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
00001e  5d9e              LDRB     r6,[r3,r6]
000020  541e              STRB     r6,[r3,r0]
;;;2130                       a[i + 1] = temp;
000022  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
000024  559d              STRB     r5,[r3,r6]
000026  e00a              B        |L24.62|
                  |L24.40|
;;;2131                   }
;;;2132               }
;;;2133               else
;;;2134               {
;;;2135                   if(a[i] < a[i + 1])
000028  5c1f              LDRB     r7,[r3,r0]
00002a  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
00002c  5d9e              LDRB     r6,[r3,r6]
00002e  42b7              CMP      r7,r6
000030  da05              BGE      |L24.62|
;;;2136                   {
;;;2137                       temp = a[i];
000032  5c1d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r0]
;;;2138                       a[i] = a[i + 1];
000034  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
000036  5d9e              LDRB     r6,[r3,r6]
000038  541e              STRB     r6,[r3,r0]
;;;2139                       a[i + 1] = temp;
00003a  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
00003c  559d              STRB     r5,[r3,r6]
                  |L24.62|
00003e  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1              ;2122
000040  b2f0              UXTB     r0,r6                 ;2122
                  |L24.66|
000042  1e4e              SUBS     r6,r1,#1              ;2122
000044  1ab6              SUBS     r6,r6,r2              ;2122
000046  4286              CMP      r6,r0                 ;2122
000048  dce1              BGT      |L24.14|
00004a  1c56              ADDS     r6,r2,#1              ;2121
00004c  b2f2              UXTB     r2,r6                 ;2121
                  |L24.78|
00004e  1e4e              SUBS     r6,r1,#1              ;2121
000050  4296              CMP      r6,r2                 ;2121
000052  dcda              BGT      |L24.10|
;;;2140                   }
;;;2141               }
;;;2142           }
;;;2143   }
000054  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;2144   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.buffer_compare||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  buffer_compare PROC
;;;2229   
;;;2230   bool buffer_compare(pu8 arry1,pu8 arry2,u16 u16Len)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2231   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;2232   	u16 i;
;;;2233   	bool ret=TRUE;
000006  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;2234   
;;;2235   	for(i=0;i<u16Len;i++)
000008  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00000a  e007              B        |L25.28|
                  |L25.12|
;;;2236   	{
;;;2237   		if(*(arry1+i) != *(arry2+i))
00000c  5c5d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r1]
00000e  5c66              LDRB     r6,[r4,r1]
000010  42b5              CMP      r5,r6
000012  d001              BEQ      |L25.24|
;;;2238   		{
;;;2239   			ret = FALSE;
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;2240   			break;
000016  e003              B        |L25.32|
                  |L25.24|
000018  1c4d              ADDS     r5,r1,#1              ;2235
00001a  b2a9              UXTH     r1,r5                 ;2235
                  |L25.28|
00001c  4291              CMP      r1,r2                 ;2235
00001e  dbf5              BLT      |L25.12|
                  |L25.32|
000020  bf00              NOP      
;;;2241   		}
;;;2242   	}
;;;2243   	return ret;
;;;2244   }
000022  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;2245   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.isGetHpdDetConnect||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  isGetHpdDetConnect PROC
;;;757    
;;;758    bool isGetHpdDetConnect(uint8_t u8RxIndex)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;759    {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;760        pstRxHpdDetDeclare_t pstRxHpd = (pstRxHpdDetDeclare_t)&stProjectRxHpdDetTable[u8RxIndex];
000004  4814              LDR      r0,|L26.88|
000006  eb000485          ADD      r4,r0,r5,LSL #2
;;;761    
;;;762        if((pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType>=PORT_GPIOA)&&(pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType<=PORT_GPIOG))
00000a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00000c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
00000e  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000010  db1f              BLT      |L26.82|
000012  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000014  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
000016  2807              CMP      r0,#7
000018  dc1b              BGT      |L26.82|
;;;763        {
;;;764            if(pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->eInitLevel == ePinLevel_High)
00001a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00001c  7940              LDRB     r0,[r0,#5]
00001e  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000020  d10b              BNE      |L26.58|
;;;765            {
;;;766                //if((STM32_GPIO_PORT[pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType-PORT_GPIOA]->IDR & pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u16GpioPin) == pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u16GpioPin)
;;;767                if(GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(STM32_GPIO_PORT[pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType-PORT_GPIOA],pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u16GpioPin))
000022  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]
000024  8851              LDRH     r1,[r2,#2]
000026  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
000028  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1
00002a  4b0c              LDR      r3,|L26.92|
00002c  f8530022          LDR      r0,[r3,r2,LSL #2]
000030  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_ReadInputDataBit
000034  b168              CBZ      r0,|L26.82|
;;;768                {
;;;769                    return TRUE;
000036  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L26.56|
;;;770                }
;;;771            }
;;;772            else
;;;773            {
;;;774                //if((STM32_GPIO_PORT[pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType-PORT_GPIOA]->IDR & pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u16GpioPin) == 0)
;;;775                if(GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(STM32_GPIO_PORT[pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u8PortType-PORT_GPIOA],pstRxHpd->pstDetPort->u16GpioPin)==0)
;;;776                {
;;;777                    return TRUE;
;;;778                }
;;;779            }
;;;780        }
;;;781    
;;;782        return FALSE;
;;;783    }
000038  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L26.58|
00003a  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]            ;775
00003c  8851              LDRH     r1,[r2,#2]            ;775
00003e  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]            ;775
000040  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1              ;775
000042  4b06              LDR      r3,|L26.92|
000044  f8530022          LDR      r0,[r3,r2,LSL #2]     ;775
000048  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_ReadInputDataBit
00004c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L26.82|
00004e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;777
000050  e7f2              B        |L26.56|
                  |L26.82|
000052  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;782
000054  e7f0              B        |L26.56|
;;;784    
                          ENDP

000056  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L26.88|
                          DCD      stProjectRxHpdDetTable
                  |L26.92|
                          DCD      STM32_GPIO_PORT

                          AREA ||i.isNumberCmd||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  isNumberCmd PROC
;;;1836   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------
;;;1837   bool isNumberCmd(char *cmd, uint16_t len)
000000  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1838   {
000002  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1839       uint16_t i;
;;;1840   
;;;1841       for(i=0; i<len; i++)
000004  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000006  e009              B        |L27.28|
                  |L27.8|
;;;1842       {
;;;1843           if((cmd[i]<'0')||(cmd[i]>'9'))
000008  5c50              LDRB     r0,[r2,r1]
00000a  2830              CMP      r0,#0x30
00000c  db02              BLT      |L27.20|
00000e  5c50              LDRB     r0,[r2,r1]
000010  2839              CMP      r0,#0x39
000012  dd01              BLE      |L27.24|
                  |L27.20|
;;;1844           {
;;;1845               return FALSE;
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L27.22|
;;;1846           }
;;;1847       }
;;;1848   
;;;1849       return TRUE;
;;;1850   }
000016  4770              BX       lr
                  |L27.24|
000018  1c48              ADDS     r0,r1,#1              ;1841
00001a  b281              UXTH     r1,r0                 ;1841
                  |L27.28|
00001c  4299              CMP      r1,r3                 ;1841
00001e  dbf3              BLT      |L27.8|
000020  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1849
000022  e7f8              B        |L27.22|
;;;1851   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.isRxHpdDetNull||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  isRxHpdDetNull PROC
;;;736    
;;;737    bool isRxHpdDetNull(uint8_t u8RxIndex)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;738    {
000002  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;739        uint8_t u8TblElmtNum = 0;
000004  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
;;;740        pstRxHpdDetDeclare_t pstRxHpd, pstRxHpdOrg = (pstRxHpdDetDeclare_t)&stProjectRxHpdDetTable[0];
000006  4c0c              LDR      r4,|L28.56|
;;;741    
;;;742        pstRxHpd = pstRxHpdOrg;
000008  4623              MOV      r3,r4
;;;743        while(pstRxHpd->pstDetPort != NULL)
00000a  e002              B        |L28.18|
                  |L28.12|
;;;744        {
;;;745            u8TblElmtNum ++;
00000c  1c50              ADDS     r0,r2,#1
00000e  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;746            pstRxHpd ++;
000010  1d1b              ADDS     r3,r3,#4
                  |L28.18|
000012  6818              LDR      r0,[r3,#0]            ;743
000014  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;743
000016  d1f9              BNE      |L28.12|
;;;747        }
;;;748    
;;;749        if(u8TblElmtNum == 0) return TRUE;
000018  b90a              CBNZ     r2,|L28.30|
00001a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L28.28|
;;;750        if(u8RxIndex >= u8TblElmtNum) return TRUE;
;;;751    
;;;752        pstRxHpd = pstRxHpdOrg + u8RxIndex;
;;;753        if(pstRxHpd->pstDetPort == NULL) return TRUE;
;;;754    
;;;755        return FALSE;
;;;756    }
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L28.30|
00001e  4291              CMP      r1,r2                 ;750
000020  db01              BLT      |L28.38|
000022  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;750
000024  e7fa              B        |L28.28|
                  |L28.38|
000026  eb040381          ADD      r3,r4,r1,LSL #2       ;752
00002a  6818              LDR      r0,[r3,#0]            ;753
00002c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L28.50|
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;753
000030  e7f4              B        |L28.28|
                  |L28.50|
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;755
000034  e7f2              B        |L28.28|
;;;757    
                          ENDP

000036  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L28.56|
                          DCD      stProjectRxHpdDetTable

                          AREA ||i.is_edid_compare_same||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  is_edid_compare_same PROC
;;;207    
;;;208    bool is_edid_compare_same(iTE_pu8 arry1,iTE_pu8 arry2)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;209    {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000004  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;210        iTE_u16 i;
;;;211        bool ret=TRUE;
000006  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;212    
;;;213        for(i=0;i<256;i++)  // 127
000008  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00000a  e007              B        |L29.28|
                  |L29.12|
;;;214        {
;;;215            if(*(arry1+i) != *(arry2+i))
00000c  5c54              LDRB     r4,[r2,r1]
00000e  5c5d              LDRB     r5,[r3,r1]
000010  42ac              CMP      r4,r5
000012  d001              BEQ      |L29.24|
;;;216            {
;;;217                ret = FALSE;
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;218                break;
000016  e003              B        |L29.32|
                  |L29.24|
000018  1c4c              ADDS     r4,r1,#1              ;213
00001a  b2a1              UXTH     r1,r4                 ;213
                  |L29.28|
00001c  29ff              CMP      r1,#0xff              ;213
00001e  ddf5              BLE      |L29.12|
                  |L29.32|
000020  bf00              NOP      
;;;219            }
;;;220        }
;;;221        return ret;
;;;222    }
000022  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;223    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.is_edid_valid||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  is_edid_valid PROC
;;;133    
;;;134    bool is_edid_valid(iTE_u8 *edid_table)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;135    {
;;;136        if((edid_table[0]==0x00)&&(edid_table[1]==0xFF)&&(edid_table[2]==0xFF)&&\
000002  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]
000004  b9a8              CBNZ     r0,|L30.50|
000006  7848              LDRB     r0,[r1,#1]
000008  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
00000a  d112              BNE      |L30.50|
00000c  7888              LDRB     r0,[r1,#2]
00000e  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
000010  d10f              BNE      |L30.50|
;;;137            (edid_table[3]==0xFF)&&(edid_table[4]==0xFF)&&(edid_table[5]==0xFF)&&\
000012  78c8              LDRB     r0,[r1,#3]
000014  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
000016  d10c              BNE      |L30.50|
000018  7908              LDRB     r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
00001c  d109              BNE      |L30.50|
00001e  7948              LDRB     r0,[r1,#5]
000020  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
000022  d106              BNE      |L30.50|
;;;138            (edid_table[6]==0xFF)&&(edid_table[7]==0x00))
000024  7988              LDRB     r0,[r1,#6]
000026  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff
000028  d103              BNE      |L30.50|
00002a  79c8              LDRB     r0,[r1,#7]
00002c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L30.50|
;;;139        {
;;;140            return TRUE;
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L30.48|
;;;141        }
;;;142    
;;;143        return FALSE;
;;;144    }
000030  4770              BX       lr
                  |L30.50|
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;143
000034  e7fc              B        |L30.48|
;;;145    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_CopyEdidPhysicalAddress||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  mapp_CopyEdidPhysicalAddress PROC
;;;1732   
;;;1733   bool mapp_CopyEdidPhysicalAddress(u8 *pu8InEdidBuf,u8 *pu8OutEdidBuf)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1734   {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000004  460a              MOV      r2,r1
;;;1735       u8 i,j;
;;;1736       u16 l_u16PhyAddr = 0;
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1737       bool l_bRetSta = FALSE;
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1738       u8 l_u8CheckSum = 0;
00000a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1739   
;;;1740       if((pu8InEdidBuf[0x7E] != 0)&&(pu8OutEdidBuf[0x7E] != 0))
00000c  f893707e          LDRB     r7,[r3,#0x7e]
000010  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000012  d05c              BEQ      |L31.206|
000014  f892707e          LDRB     r7,[r2,#0x7e]
000018  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
00001a  d058              BEQ      |L31.206|
;;;1741       {
;;;1742           for(i=0; i<128;i++)
00001c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00001e  e01f              B        |L31.96|
                  |L31.32|
;;;1743           {
;;;1744               if((pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x60)
000020  f1010780          ADD      r7,r1,#0x80
000024  5ddf              LDRB     r7,[r3,r7]
000026  f00707e0          AND      r7,r7,#0xe0
00002a  2f60              CMP      r7,#0x60
00002c  d116              BNE      |L31.92|
;;;1745               {
;;;1746                   if((pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+1]==0x03)
00002e  f1010781          ADD      r7,r1,#0x81
000032  5ddf              LDRB     r7,[r3,r7]
000034  2f03              CMP      r7,#3
000036  d111              BNE      |L31.92|
;;;1747                       &&(pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+2]==0x0C)
000038  f1010782          ADD      r7,r1,#0x82
00003c  5ddf              LDRB     r7,[r3,r7]
00003e  2f0c              CMP      r7,#0xc
000040  d10c              BNE      |L31.92|
;;;1748                       &&(pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+3]==0x00))
000042  f1010783          ADD      r7,r1,#0x83
000046  5ddf              LDRB     r7,[r3,r7]
000048  b947              CBNZ     r7,|L31.92|
;;;1749                   {
;;;1750                       l_u16PhyAddr = (pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+4]<<8)|(pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+5]);
00004a  f1010785          ADD      r7,r1,#0x85
00004e  f813c007          LDRB     r12,[r3,r7]
000052  1e7f              SUBS     r7,r7,#1
000054  5ddf              LDRB     r7,[r3,r7]
000056  ea4c2507          ORR      r5,r12,r7,LSL #8
;;;1751                       break;
00005a  e003              B        |L31.100|
                  |L31.92|
00005c  1c4f              ADDS     r7,r1,#1              ;1742
00005e  b2f9              UXTB     r1,r7                 ;1742
                  |L31.96|
000060  2980              CMP      r1,#0x80              ;1742
000062  dbdd              BLT      |L31.32|
                  |L31.100|
000064  bf00              NOP      
;;;1752                   }
;;;1753               }
;;;1754           }
;;;1755   
;;;1756           for(i=0; i<128;i++)
000066  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000068  e02e              B        |L31.200|
                  |L31.106|
;;;1757           {
;;;1758               if((pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x60)
00006a  f1010780          ADD      r7,r1,#0x80
00006e  5dd7              LDRB     r7,[r2,r7]
000070  f00707e0          AND      r7,r7,#0xe0
000074  2f60              CMP      r7,#0x60
000076  d125              BNE      |L31.196|
;;;1759               {
;;;1760                   if((pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i+1]==0x03)
000078  f1010781          ADD      r7,r1,#0x81
00007c  5dd7              LDRB     r7,[r2,r7]
00007e  2f03              CMP      r7,#3
000080  d120              BNE      |L31.196|
;;;1761                       &&(pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i+2]==0x0C)
000082  f1010782          ADD      r7,r1,#0x82
000086  5dd7              LDRB     r7,[r2,r7]
000088  2f0c              CMP      r7,#0xc
00008a  d11b              BNE      |L31.196|
;;;1762                       &&(pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i+3]==0x00))
00008c  f1010783          ADD      r7,r1,#0x83
000090  5dd7              LDRB     r7,[r2,r7]
000092  b9bf              CBNZ     r7,|L31.196|
;;;1763                   {
;;;1764                       //l_u16PhyAddr = (pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+4]<<8)|(pu8InEdidBuf[0x80+i+5]);
;;;1765                       pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i+4] = (u8)((l_u16PhyAddr>>8)&0xFF);
000094  ea4f2c15          LSR      r12,r5,#8
000098  f1010784          ADD      r7,r1,#0x84
00009c  f802c007          STRB     r12,[r2,r7]
;;;1766                       pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+i+5] = (u8)(l_u16PhyAddr&0xFF);
0000a0  1c7f              ADDS     r7,r7,#1
0000a2  55d5              STRB     r5,[r2,r7]
;;;1767   
;;;1768                       for(j=0;j<127;j++)
0000a4  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0000a6  e006              B        |L31.182|
                  |L31.168|
;;;1769                       {
;;;1770                           l_u8CheckSum += pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+j];
0000a8  f1040780          ADD      r7,r4,#0x80
0000ac  5dd7              LDRB     r7,[r2,r7]
0000ae  4437              ADD      r7,r7,r6
0000b0  b2fe              UXTB     r6,r7
0000b2  1c67              ADDS     r7,r4,#1              ;1768
0000b4  b2fc              UXTB     r4,r7                 ;1768
                  |L31.182|
0000b6  2c7f              CMP      r4,#0x7f              ;1768
0000b8  dbf6              BLT      |L31.168|
;;;1771                       }
;;;1772                       pu8OutEdidBuf[0x80+0x7F] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
0000ba  4277              RSBS     r7,r6,#0
0000bc  f88270ff          STRB     r7,[r2,#0xff]
;;;1773                       l_bRetSta = TRUE;
0000c0  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1774                       break;
0000c2  e003              B        |L31.204|
                  |L31.196|
0000c4  1c4f              ADDS     r7,r1,#1              ;1756
0000c6  b2f9              UXTB     r1,r7                 ;1756
                  |L31.200|
0000c8  2980              CMP      r1,#0x80              ;1756
0000ca  dbce              BLT      |L31.106|
                  |L31.204|
0000cc  bf00              NOP      
                  |L31.206|
;;;1775                   }
;;;1776               }
;;;1777           }
;;;1778       }
;;;1779   
;;;1780       return l_bRetSta;
;;;1781   }
0000ce  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;1782   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_EdidLimitTo1080p60||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_EdidLimitTo1080p60 PROC
;;;1591   ***************************************************/
;;;1592   bool mapp_EdidLimitTo1080p60(u8 *u8pInEdid,
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1593                                       u8 *u8pOutEdid,
;;;1594                                       u16 u16len)
;;;1595   {
000004  b0a6              SUB      sp,sp,#0x98
000006  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000008  460c              MOV      r4,r1
00000a  4690              MOV      r8,r2
;;;1596       u8 i;
;;;1597       u8 l_u8CheckSum=0;
00000c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1598       uint8_t const l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[18] = //4k@30, 297M
00000e  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000010  a130              ADR      r1,|L32.212|
000012  a821              ADD      r0,sp,#0x84
000014  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;1599       {
;;;1600           0x02, 0x3A, 0x80, 0x18, 0x71, 0x38, 0x2D, 0x40, 0x58,
;;;1601           0x2C, 0x45, 0x00, 0x20, 0xC2, 0x31, 0x00, 0x00, 0x1E
;;;1602       };
;;;1603   
;;;1604       if(is_edid_valid(u8pInEdid) == FALSE)
000018  4638              MOV      r0,r7
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       is_edid_valid
00001e  b918              CBNZ     r0,|L32.40|
;;;1605       {
;;;1606           return false;
000020  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L32.34|
;;;1607       }
;;;1608       memcpy(u8pOutEdid,u8pInEdid,u16len);
;;;1609   
;;;1610       // block 0
;;;1611       #if _CLR_SAMSUN_EDID_SERIAL_NUM
;;;1612       if(u8pOutEdid[0x08]==0x4C&&u8pOutEdid[0x09]==0x2D)  // if ID is SAM, Change the ID serial number 00000000
;;;1613       {
;;;1614           u8pOutEdid[0x0C]=0x00;
;;;1615           u8pOutEdid[0x0D]=0x00;
;;;1616           u8pOutEdid[0x0E]=0x00;
;;;1617           u8pOutEdid[0x0F]=0x00;
;;;1618       }
;;;1619       #endif
;;;1620   
;;;1621   //    if((((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==3840)
;;;1622   //        ||((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==4096))
;;;1623   //        &&((((u8pOutEdid[0x3D]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x3B]))==2160))
;;;1624       {
;;;1625           if(((u8pOutEdid[0x37]<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x36]))>16500)
;;;1626           {
;;;1627               for(i=0;i<18;i++)
;;;1628               {
;;;1629                   u8pOutEdid[0x36+i] = l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[i];
;;;1630               }
;;;1631           }
;;;1632       }
;;;1633   
;;;1634       #if 0
;;;1635       for(i=0x49;i<127;i++)
;;;1636       {
;;;1637           if((u8pOutEdid[i]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+1]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+2]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+3]==0xFD))
;;;1638           {
;;;1639               if(u8pOutEdid[i+9]>0x1E)
;;;1640               {
;;;1641                   u8pOutEdid[i+9] = 0x1E;
;;;1642               }
;;;1643           }
;;;1644       }
;;;1645       #endif
;;;1646   
;;;1647   #if _SET_RANGE_LIMITS_BLOCK
;;;1648       for(i=0x49;i<127;i++)
;;;1649       {
;;;1650           if((u8pOutEdid[i]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+1]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+2]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+3]==0xFD))
;;;1651           {
;;;1652               if(u8pOutEdid[i+5]>0x17)
;;;1653               {
;;;1654                   u8pOutEdid[i+5] = 0x17;
;;;1655               }
;;;1656               //if(u8pOutEdid[i+6]>0x55)
;;;1657               //{
;;;1658               //    u8pOutEdid[i+6] = 0x55;
;;;1659               //}
;;;1660               if(u8pOutEdid[i+7]>0x0F)
;;;1661               {
;;;1662                   u8pOutEdid[i+7] = 0x0F;
;;;1663               }
;;;1664               //if(u8pOutEdid[i+8]>0x5C)
;;;1665               //{
;;;1666               //    u8pOutEdid[i+8] = 0x5C;
;;;1667               //}
;;;1668               if(u8pOutEdid[i+9]>0x1E)
;;;1669               {
;;;1670                   u8pOutEdid[i+9] = 0x1E;
;;;1671               }
;;;1672           }
;;;1673       }
;;;1674   #endif
;;;1675   
;;;1676       for(i=0;i<127;i++)
;;;1677       {
;;;1678           l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i];
;;;1679       }
;;;1680       u8pOutEdid[0x7F] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
;;;1681   
;;;1682       // block 1
;;;1683       if((u8pOutEdid[0x7E]>0)&&(u16len>128))
;;;1684       {
;;;1685           const u8 cl_u8EdidCeaBlockDefault[128]={
;;;1686                   0x02, 0x03, 0x23, 0x72, 0x4B, 0x90, 0x9F, 0x22, 0x21, 0x20, 0x05, 0x14, 0x04, 0x13, 0x12, 0x03,
;;;1687                   0x23, 0x09, 0x1F, 0x07, 0x83, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x67, 0x03, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00, 0x20,
;;;1688                   0xE2, 0x00, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
;;;1689                   0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
;;;1690                   0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
;;;1691                   0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
;;;1692                   0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
;;;1693                   0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0xD7,
;;;1694               };
;;;1695           memcpy(&u8pOutEdid[0x80],cl_u8EdidCeaBlockDefault,128);
;;;1696           l_u8CheckSum = 0;
;;;1697           for(i=0;i<127;i++)
;;;1698           {
;;;1699               l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i+0x80];
;;;1700           }
;;;1701           u8pOutEdid[0x7F+0x80] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
;;;1702       }
;;;1703   
;;;1704       return true;
;;;1705   }
000022  b026              ADD      sp,sp,#0x98
000024  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
                  |L32.40|
000028  4642              MOV      r2,r8                 ;1608
00002a  4639              MOV      r1,r7                 ;1608
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1608
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
000032  7a20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#8]            ;1612
000034  284c              CMP      r0,#0x4c              ;1612
000036  d107              BNE      |L32.72|
000038  7a60              LDRB     r0,[r4,#9]            ;1612
00003a  282d              CMP      r0,#0x2d              ;1612
00003c  d104              BNE      |L32.72|
00003e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1614
000040  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]          ;1614

                  |L32.72|
000048  f8940036          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x36]         ;1625

                  |L32.232|
                          DCD      ||.constdata||+0x128

                          AREA ||i.mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block0||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block0 PROC
;;;1231   ***************************************************/
;;;1232   bool mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block0(u8 *u8pInEdid,
000000  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;1233                                       u8 *u8pOutEdid,
;;;1234                                       u16 u16len,
;;;1235                                       bool bIsLimitTiming)
;;;1236   {
000004  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000006  4606              MOV      r6,r0
000008  460c              MOV      r4,r1
00000a  4691              MOV      r9,r2
00000c  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;1237       u8 i;
;;;1238       u8 l_u8CheckSum=0;
00000e  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
;;;1239       uint8_t const l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[18] = //4k@30, 297M
000012  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000014  a12f              ADR      r1,|L33.212|
000016  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000018  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;1240       {
;;;1241           0x04,0x74,0x00,0x30,0xF2,0x70,0x5A,0x80,0xB0,
;;;1242           0x58,0x8A,0x00,0x20,0xC2,0x31,0x00,0x00,0x1E,
;;;1243       };
;;;1244   
;;;1245       if(is_edid_valid(u8pInEdid) == FALSE)
00001c  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       is_edid_valid
000022  b918              CBNZ     r0,|L33.44|
;;;1246       {
;;;1247           return FALSE;
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L33.38|
;;;1248       }
;;;1249       memcpy(u8pOutEdid,u8pInEdid,u16len);
;;;1250   
;;;1251       // block 0
;;;1252       #if _CLR_SAMSUN_EDID_SERIAL_NUM
;;;1253       if(u8pOutEdid[0x08]==0x4C&&u8pOutEdid[0x09]==0x2D)  // if ID is SAM, Change the ID serial number 00000000
;;;1254       {
;;;1255           u8pOutEdid[0x0C]=0x00;
;;;1256           u8pOutEdid[0x0D]=0x00;
;;;1257           u8pOutEdid[0x0E]=0x00;
;;;1258           u8pOutEdid[0x0F]=0x00;
;;;1259       }
;;;1260       #endif
;;;1261   
;;;1262       if(bIsLimitTiming)
;;;1263       {
;;;1264           if((((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==3840)
;;;1265               ||((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==4096))
;;;1266               &&((((u8pOutEdid[0x3D]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x3B]))==2160))
;;;1267           {
;;;1268               if(((u8pOutEdid[0x37]<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x36]))>30000)
;;;1269               {
;;;1270                   for(i=0;i<18;i++)
;;;1271                   {
;;;1272                       u8pOutEdid[0x36+i] = l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[i];
;;;1273                   }
;;;1274               }
;;;1275           }
;;;1276       }
;;;1277       #if _SET_RANGE_LIMITS_BLOCK
;;;1278       for(i=0x49;i<127;i++)
;;;1279       {
;;;1280           if((u8pOutEdid[i]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+1]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+2]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+3]==0xFD))
;;;1281           {
;;;1282               if(u8pOutEdid[i+5]>0x17)
;;;1283               {
;;;1284                   u8pOutEdid[i+5] = 0x17;
;;;1285               }
;;;1286               //if(u8pOutEdid[i+6]>0x55)
;;;1287               //{
;;;1288               //    u8pOutEdid[i+6] = 0x55;
;;;1289               //}
;;;1290               if(u8pOutEdid[i+7]>0x0F)
;;;1291               {
;;;1292                   u8pOutEdid[i+7] = 0x0F;
;;;1293               }
;;;1294               //if(u8pOutEdid[i+8]>0x5C)
;;;1295               //{
;;;1296               //    u8pOutEdid[i+8] = 0x5C;
;;;1297               //}
;;;1298               if(u8pOutEdid[i+9]>0x1E)
;;;1299               {
;;;1300                   u8pOutEdid[i+9] = 0x1E;
;;;1301               }
;;;1302           }
;;;1303       }
;;;1304       #endif
;;;1305   
;;;1306       for(i=0;i<127;i++)
;;;1307       {
;;;1308           l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i];
;;;1309       }
;;;1310       u8pOutEdid[0x7F] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
;;;1311   
;;;1312       return TRUE;
;;;1313   }
000026  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000028  e8bd83f0          POP      {r4-r9,pc}
                  |L33.44|
00002c  464a              MOV      r2,r9                 ;1249
00002e  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;1249
000030  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1249
000032  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
000036  7a20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#8]            ;1253
000038  284c              CMP      r0,#0x4c              ;1253
00003a  d107              BNE      |L33.76|
00003c  7a60              LDRB     r0,[r4,#9]            ;1253
00003e  282d              CMP      r0,#0x2d              ;1253
000040  d104              BNE      |L33.76|
000042  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1255
000044  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]          ;1255
000046  7360              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xd]          ;1256
000048  73a0              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xe]          ;1257
00004a  73e0              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xf]          ;1258
                  |L33.76|
00004c  b397              CBZ      r7,|L33.180|
00004e  f8940038          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x38]         ;1264
000052  f894103a          LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x3a]         ;1264
000056  1109              ASRS     r1,r1,#4              ;1264
000058  ea402001          ORR      r0,r0,r1,LSL #8       ;1264
00005c  f5b06f70          CMP      r0,#0xf00             ;1264
000060  d009              BEQ      |L33.118|
000062  f8940038          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x38]         ;1265

00006a  1109              ASRS     r1,r1,#4              ;1265
00006c  ea402001          ORR      r0,r0,r1,LSL #8       ;1265
000070  f5b05f80          CMP      r0,#0x1000            ;1265
000074  d11e              BNE      |L33.180|
                  |L33.118|
000076  f894003b          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x3b]         ;1266

000080  ea402001          ORR      r0,r0,r1,LSL #8       ;1266
000084  f5b06f07          CMP      r0,#0x870             ;1266

00008a  f8940036          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x36]         ;1268
00008e  f8941037          LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x37]         ;1268
000092  ea402001          ORR      r0,r0,r1,LSL #8       ;1268
000096  f2475130          MOV      r1,#0x7530            ;1268
00009a  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;1268
00009c  dd0a              BLE      |L33.180|
00009e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0                 ;1270
0000a0  e006              B        |L33.176|
                  |L33.162|
0000a2  f81d1005          LDRB     r1,[sp,r5]            ;1272
0000a6  f1050036          ADD      r0,r5,#0x36           ;1272

0000ac  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1270
0000ae  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1270
                  |L33.176|
0000b0  2d12              CMP      r5,#0x12              ;1270
0000b2  dbf6              BLT      |L33.162|
                  |L33.180|
0000b4  2500              MOVS     r5,#0                 ;1306
0000b6  e005              B        |L33.196|
                  |L33.184|

                          AREA ||i.mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block1||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block1 PROC
;;;1324   ***************************************************/
;;;1325   bool mapp_EdidLimitTo300M_Block1(u8 *u8pInEdid,
000000  e92d4fff          PUSH     {r0-r11,lr}
;;;1326                                       u8 *u8pOutEdid,
;;;1327                                       u16 u16len,
;;;1328                                       bool bRemoveVDB6G,
;;;1329                                       bool bEnInterlace,
;;;1330                                       bool bOnlyPcm20,
;;;1331                                       bool bRemove420)
;;;1332   {
000004  b08b              SUB      sp,sp,#0x2c
000006  4681              MOV      r9,r0
000008  460e              MOV      r6,r1
00000a  469a              MOV      r10,r3
00000c  f8ddb060          LDR      r11,[sp,#0x60]
;;;1333       u8 i;
;;;1334       u8 l_u8CheckSum=0;
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000012  900a              STR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
;;;1335       memcpy(u8pOutEdid,u8pInEdid,u16len);
000014  4649              MOV      r1,r9
000016  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000018  9a0d              LDR      r2,[sp,#0x34]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;1336   
;;;1337       // block 1
;;;1338       {
;;;1339           if((u8pOutEdid[0] == 0x02) && (u8pOutEdid[1] == 0x03))
00001e  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
000020  2802              CMP      r0,#2
                  |L34.34|
000022  d173              BNE      |L34.268|
000024  7870              LDRB     r0,[r6,#1]
000026  2803              CMP      r0,#3
000028  d1fb              BNE      |L34.34|
;;;1340           {
;;;1341               u8 l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
00002a  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
00002c  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1342               u8 j=0;
00002e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1343               u8 l_u8Offect = 0;
000030  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;1344               #if _CLR_VIDEO_DATA_BLOCK_6G
;;;1345               u8 l_pu8Vdb[31]={0};

000034  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
000036  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;1346               u8 l_u8VdbId = 0;
00003a  46a8              MOV      r8,r5
;;;1347               #endif
;;;1348   
;;;1349               for(i=4;i<l_u8DataBlockLen;i++)

00003e  e156              B        |L34.750|
                  |L34.64|
;;;1350               {
;;;1351                   l_u8Offect = u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0x1F;

000042  f000071f          AND      r7,r0,#0x1f
;;;1352   
;;;1353                   #if _CLR_VIDEO_DATA_BLOCK_6G
;;;1354                   if(((u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0xE0)==0x40)&&(bRemoveVDB6G == TRUE)) // video data block

000048  f00000e0          AND      r0,r0,#0xe0

00004e  d172              BNE      |L34.310|
000050  f1ba0f01          CMP      r10,#1
000054  d17e              BNE      |L34.340|
;;;1355                   {
;;;1356                       for(j=0;j<l_u8Offect;j++)

000058  e04f              B        |L34.250|
                  |L34.90|
;;;1357                       {
;;;1358                           if(bEnInterlace&&((((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1+j]&0x7F)>=96)&&((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1+j]&0x7F)<=97))
00005a  f1bb0f00          CMP      r11,#0
00005e  d023              BEQ      |L34.168|
000060  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
000062  4428              ADD      r0,r0,r5
000064  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
000066  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f

                  |L34.124|

                  |L34.152|

                  |L34.166|

0000a6  e026              B        |L34.246|
                  |L34.168|
;;;1362   
;;;1363                           if((bEnInterlace==FALSE)&&(((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1+j]>=96)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+1+j]<=97))

0000ac  d119              BNE      |L34.226|
0000ae  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1

0000c4  4428              ADD      r0,r0,r5

0000d2  2866              CMP      r0,#0x66
0000d4  dd04              BLE      |L34.224|
                  |L34.214|

0000d8  4428              ADD      r0,r0,r5
0000da  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0000dc  286a              CMP      r0,#0x6a
0000de  db00              BLT      |L34.226|
                  |L34.224|
;;;1366                           {
;;;1367                               continue;
0000e0  e009              B        |L34.246|
                  |L34.226|
;;;1368                           }
;;;1369                           else
;;;1370                           {
;;;1371                               l_pu8Vdb[l_u8VdbId++] = u8pOutEdid[0+i+1+j];

0000e4  4428              ADD      r0,r0,r5

0000ea  1c41              ADDS     r1,r0,#1
0000ec  f00108ff          AND      r8,r1,#0xff

                  |L34.246|

0000fc  dbad              BLT      |L34.90|
;;;1372                           }
;;;1373                       }
;;;1374                       if(l_u8VdbId != l_u8Offect)
