000100  d024              BEQ      |L34.332|

;;;1376                           u8pOutEdid[0+i] = (0x40|l_u8VdbId);

000106  5530              STRB     r0,[r6,r4]
;;;1377                           for(j=0;j<l_u8VdbId;j++)

00010a  e007              B        |L34.284|
                  |L34.268|
00010c  e0f4              B        |L34.760|
                  |L34.270|

;;;1380                           }

000126  1a40              SUBS     r0,r0,r1
000128  70b0              STRB     r0,[r6,#2]
;;;1382                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];

00012c  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1383                           for(j=(i+1+l_u8Offect);j<127;j++)

                  |L34.310|

                  |L34.312|
;;;1384                           {
;;;1385                               u8pOutEdid[0+j-(l_u8Offect-l_u8VdbId)] = u8pInEdid[0+j];

00014a  dbf5              BLT      |L34.312|
                  |L34.332|
;;;1386                           }
;;;1387                       }
;;;1388                       i += l_u8VdbId;

000150  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
000152  e0ca              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.340|
;;;1389                   }
;;;1390                   else
;;;1391                   #endif
;;;1392                   #if _SET_AUDIO_DATA_BLOCK_LIMIT_PCM20
;;;1393                   if(((u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0xE0)==0x20)&&(bOnlyPcm20 == TRUE)) // video data block
000154  5d30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r4]
000156  f00000e0          AND      r0,r0,#0xe0
00015a  2820              CMP      r0,#0x20
00015c  d136              BNE      |L34.460|
00015e  9819              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x64]
000160  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000162  d133              BNE      |L34.460|
;;;1394                   {
;;;1395                       u8 l_u8PCMData[] = {0x09,0x04,0x07};
000164  a06f              ADR      r0,|L34.804|
000166  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000168  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1396                       u8pOutEdid[0+i] = ((u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0xE0)|0x03);
00016a  5d30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r4]
00016c  f00000e0          AND      r0,r0,#0xe0
000170  1cc0              ADDS     r0,r0,#3
000172  5530              STRB     r0,[r6,r4]
;;;1397                       for(j=1;j<4;j++)
000174  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
000176  e006              B        |L34.390|
                  |L34.376|
;;;1398                       {
;;;1399                           u8pOutEdid[0+i+j] = l_u8PCMData[j-1];
000178  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
00017a  f81d0000          LDRB     r0,[sp,r0]
00017e  1961              ADDS     r1,r4,r5
000180  5470              STRB     r0,[r6,r1]
000182  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1397
000184  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1397
                  |L34.390|
000186  2d04              CMP      r5,#4                 ;1397
000188  dbf6              BLT      |L34.376|
;;;1400                       }
;;;1401                       for(j=i;j<127;j++)
00018a  4625              MOV      r5,r4
00018c  e012              B        |L34.436|
                  |L34.398|
;;;1402                       {
;;;1403                           if((0+j+4)>127)
00018e  1d28              ADDS     r0,r5,#4
000190  287f              CMP      r0,#0x7f
000192  dd00              BLE      |L34.406|
;;;1404                           {
;;;1405                               break;
000194  e010              B        |L34.440|
                  |L34.406|
;;;1406                           }
;;;1407                           if((0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<127)
000196  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
000198  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00019a  287f              CMP      r0,#0x7f
00019c  da05              BGE      |L34.426|
;;;1408                           {
;;;1409                               u8pOutEdid[0+j+4] = u8pOutEdid[0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
00019e  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
0001a0  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0001a2  5c31              LDRB     r1,[r6,r0]
0001a4  1d28              ADDS     r0,r5,#4
0001a6  5431              STRB     r1,[r6,r0]
0001a8  e002              B        |L34.432|
                  |L34.426|
;;;1410                           }
;;;1411                           else
;;;1412                           {
;;;1413                               u8pOutEdid[0+j+4] = 0;
0001aa  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0001ac  1d28              ADDS     r0,r5,#4
0001ae  5431              STRB     r1,[r6,r0]
                  |L34.432|
0001b0  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1401
0001b2  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1401
                  |L34.436|
0001b4  2d7f              CMP      r5,#0x7f              ;1401
0001b6  dbea              BLT      |L34.398|
                  |L34.440|
0001b8  bf00              NOP                            ;1405
;;;1414                           }
;;;1415                       }
;;;1416                       u8pOutEdid[2] = u8pOutEdid[2] - (l_u8Offect-3);
0001ba  78b1              LDRB     r1,[r6,#2]
0001bc  1ef8              SUBS     r0,r7,#3
0001be  1a08              SUBS     r0,r1,r0
0001c0  70b0              STRB     r0,[r6,#2]
;;;1417                       l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
0001c2  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
0001c4  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1418                       i += 3;
0001c6  1ce0              ADDS     r0,r4,#3
0001c8  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
;;;1419                   }
0001ca  e08e              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.460|
;;;1420                   else
;;;1421                   #endif
;;;1422                   #if _CLR_VSDB_HDMI_FORUM_BLOCK
;;;1423                   if((u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0xE0)==0x60)    // vsdb
0001cc  5d30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r4]
0001ce  f00000e0          AND      r0,r0,#0xe0
0001d2  2860              CMP      r0,#0x60
0001d4  d13d              BNE      |L34.594|
;;;1424                   {
;;;1425                       if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1] == 0xD8)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+2] == 0x5D)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+3] == 0xC4))      //HDMI FORUM
0001d6  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
0001d8  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0001da  28d8              CMP      r0,#0xd8
0001dc  d121              BNE      |L34.546|
0001de  1ca0              ADDS     r0,r4,#2
0001e0  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0001e2  285d              CMP      r0,#0x5d
0001e4  d11d              BNE      |L34.546|
0001e6  1ce0              ADDS     r0,r4,#3
0001e8  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0001ea  28c4              CMP      r0,#0xc4
0001ec  d119              BNE      |L34.546|
;;;1426                       {
;;;1427                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete hdmi forum block
0001ee  4625              MOV      r5,r4
0001f0  e00c              B        |L34.524|
                  |L34.498|
;;;1428                           {
;;;1429                               if((0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<127)
0001f2  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
0001f4  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0001f6  287f              CMP      r0,#0x7f
0001f8  da04              BGE      |L34.516|
;;;1430                               {
;;;1431                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = u8pOutEdid[0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
0001fa  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
0001fc  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0001fe  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
000200  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
000202  e001              B        |L34.520|
                  |L34.516|
;;;1432                               }
;;;1433                               else
;;;1434                               {
;;;1435                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = 0;
000204  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000206  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
                  |L34.520|
000208  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1427
00020a  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1427
                  |L34.524|
00020c  2d7f              CMP      r5,#0x7f              ;1427
00020e  dbf0              BLT      |L34.498|
;;;1436                               }
;;;1437                           }
;;;1438                           u8pOutEdid[2] = u8pOutEdid[2] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
000210  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
000212  1bc0              SUBS     r0,r0,r7
000214  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000216  70b0              STRB     r0,[r6,#2]
;;;1439                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
000218  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
00021a  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1440                           i -= 1; // return to previous index
00021c  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
00021e  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
000220  e063              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.546|
;;;1441                       }
;;;1442                       else if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1] == 0x03)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+2] == 0x0C)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+3] == 0x00))
000222  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
000224  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
000226  2803              CMP      r0,#3
000228  d110              BNE      |L34.588|
00022a  1ca0              ADDS     r0,r4,#2
00022c  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
00022e  280c              CMP      r0,#0xc
000230  d10c              BNE      |L34.588|
000232  1ce0              ADDS     r0,r4,#3
000234  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
000236  b948              CBNZ     r0,|L34.588|
;;;1443                       {
;;;1444                           if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+7] > 0x3C)) // max Clock > 300 0x3C*5 = 300
000238  1de0              ADDS     r0,r4,#7
00023a  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
00023c  283c              CMP      r0,#0x3c
00023e  dd02              BLE      |L34.582|
;;;1445                           {
;;;1446                               u8pOutEdid[0+i+7] = 0x3C;
000240  213c              MOVS     r1,#0x3c
000242  1de0              ADDS     r0,r4,#7
000244  5431              STRB     r1,[r6,r0]
                  |L34.582|
;;;1447                           }
;;;1448                           i += l_u8Offect;
000246  19e0              ADDS     r0,r4,r7
000248  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
00024a  e04e              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.588|
;;;1449                       }
;;;1450                       else
;;;1451                           i += l_u8Offect;
00024c  19e0              ADDS     r0,r4,r7
00024e  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
000250  e04b              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.594|
;;;1452                   }
;;;1453                   else
;;;1454                   #endif
;;;1455                   if((u8pOutEdid[0+i]&0xE0)==0xE0)    // CTA Data
000252  5d30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r4]
000254  f00000e0          AND      r0,r0,#0xe0
000258  28e0              CMP      r0,#0xe0
00025a  d144              BNE      |L34.742|
;;;1456                   {
;;;1457                       #if _CLR_YCBCR420_EDID_BLOCK
;;;1458                       if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1]==0x0F)&&(bRemove420==TRUE))      // YCbCr 420 capability map
00025c  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
00025e  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
000260  280f              CMP      r0,#0xf
000262  d11c              BNE      |L34.670|
000264  981a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x68]
000266  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000268  d119              BNE      |L34.670|
;;;1459                       {
;;;1460                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete YCbCr 420 capability map block
00026a  4625              MOV      r5,r4
00026c  e00c              B        |L34.648|
                  |L34.622|
;;;1461                           {
;;;1462                               if((0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<127)
00026e  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
000270  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000272  287f              CMP      r0,#0x7f
000274  da04              BGE      |L34.640|
;;;1463                               {
;;;1464                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = u8pOutEdid[0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
000276  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
000278  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00027a  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
00027c  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
00027e  e001              B        |L34.644|
                  |L34.640|
;;;1465                               }
;;;1466                               else
;;;1467                               {
;;;1468                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = 0;
000280  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000282  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
                  |L34.644|
000284  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1460
000286  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1460
                  |L34.648|
000288  2d7f              CMP      r5,#0x7f              ;1460
00028a  dbf0              BLT      |L34.622|
;;;1469                               }
;;;1470                           }
;;;1471                           u8pOutEdid[2] = u8pOutEdid[2] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
00028c  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
00028e  1bc0              SUBS     r0,r0,r7
000290  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000292  70b0              STRB     r0,[r6,#2]
;;;1472                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
000294  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
000296  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1473                           i -= 1;
000298  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
00029a  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
00029c  e025              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.670|
;;;1474                       }
;;;1475                       else if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+1]==0x0E)&&(bRemove420==TRUE))     // YCbCr 420 Video data
00029e  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
0002a0  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0002a2  280e              CMP      r0,#0xe
0002a4  d11c              BNE      |L34.736|
0002a6  981a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x68]
0002a8  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0002aa  d119              BNE      |L34.736|
;;;1476                       {
;;;1477                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete YCbCr 420 Video data block
0002ac  4625              MOV      r5,r4
0002ae  e00c              B        |L34.714|
                  |L34.688|
;;;1478                           {
;;;1479                               if((0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<127)
0002b0  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
0002b2  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0002b4  287f              CMP      r0,#0x7f
0002b6  da04              BGE      |L34.706|
;;;1480                               {
;;;1481                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = u8pOutEdid[0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
0002b8  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7
0002ba  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0002bc  5c30              LDRB     r0,[r6,r0]
0002be  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
0002c0  e001              B        |L34.710|
                  |L34.706|
;;;1482                               }
;;;1483                               else
;;;1484                               {
;;;1485                                   u8pOutEdid[0+j] = 0;
0002c2  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0002c4  5570              STRB     r0,[r6,r5]
                  |L34.710|
0002c6  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1477
0002c8  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1477
                  |L34.714|
0002ca  2d7f              CMP      r5,#0x7f              ;1477
0002cc  dbf0              BLT      |L34.688|
;;;1486                               }
;;;1487                           }
;;;1488                           u8pOutEdid[2] = u8pOutEdid[2] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
0002ce  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
0002d0  1bc0              SUBS     r0,r0,r7
0002d2  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
0002d4  70b0              STRB     r0,[r6,#2]
;;;1489                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
0002d6  78b0              LDRB     r0,[r6,#2]
0002d8  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
;;;1490                           i -= 1;
0002da  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
0002dc  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
0002de  e004              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.736|
;;;1491                       }
;;;1492                       else
;;;1493                       #endif
;;;1494                       #if _CLR_HDR_BLOCK
;;;1495                       if(u8pOutEdid[0+i+1]==0x06)     // HDR Static Metadata
;;;1496                       {
;;;1497                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete HDR Static Metadata
;;;1498                           {
;;;1499                               if((0x0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1500                               {
;;;1501                                   u8pOutEdid[0x0+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1502                               }
;;;1503                               else
;;;1504                               {
;;;1505                                   u8pOutEdid[0x0+j] = 0;
;;;1506                               }
;;;1507                           }
;;;1508                           u8pOutEdid[0x2] = u8pOutEdid[0x2] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1509                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x2];
;;;1510                           i -= 1;
;;;1511                       }
;;;1512                       else
;;;1513                       #endif //add by wf8421
;;;1514                       #if _SET_DOLBY_VISION_LIMIT_4K30
;;;1515                       if(u8pOutEdid[0+i+1]==0x01)  // dolby vision
;;;1516                       {
;;;1517                           // IEEE = 0x00D046
;;;1518                           if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+2] == 0x46)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+3] == 0xD0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+4] == 0x00))
;;;1519                           {
;;;1520                               if(l_u8Offect>6)
;;;1521                               {
;;;1522                                   if(((u8pOutEdid[0+i+5]&BIT6)==0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+5]&BIT1))
;;;1523                                   {
;;;1524                                       u8pOutEdid[0+i+5] = u8pOutEdid[0+i+5]&(~BIT1);    // Remove support 2160p 60Hz
;;;1525                                   }
;;;1526                                   else
;;;1527                                       i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1528                               }
;;;1529                               else
;;;1530                                   i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1531                           }
;;;1532                           else
;;;1533                               i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1534                       }
;;;1535                       else
;;;1536                       #endif
;;;1537                       #if _CLR_DOLBY_VISION_BLOCK
;;;1538                       if(u8pOutEdid[0+i+1]==0x01)  // dolby vision
;;;1539                       {
;;;1540                           if((u8pOutEdid[0+i+2] == 0x46)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+3] == 0xD0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0+i+4] == 0x00))
;;;1541                           {
;;;1542                               for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete dolby vision block
;;;1543                               {
;;;1544                                   if((0+j+l_u8Offect+1)<127)
;;;1545                                   {
;;;1546                                       u8pOutEdid[0+j] = u8pOutEdid[0+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1547                                   }
;;;1548                                   else
;;;1549                                   {
;;;1550                                       u8pOutEdid[0+j] = 0;
;;;1551                                   }
;;;1552                               }
;;;1553                               u8pOutEdid[2] = u8pOutEdid[2] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1554                               l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[2];
;;;1555                               i -= 1;
;;;1556                           }
;;;1557                           else
;;;1558                               i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1559                       }
;;;1560                       else
;;;1561                       #endif
;;;1562                       {
;;;1563                           i += l_u8Offect;
0002e0  19e0              ADDS     r0,r4,r7
0002e2  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
0002e4  e001              B        |L34.746|
                  |L34.742|
;;;1564                       }
;;;1565                   }
;;;1566                   else
;;;1567                   {
;;;1568                       i += l_u8Offect;
0002e6  19e0              ADDS     r0,r4,r7
0002e8  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
                  |L34.746|
0002ea  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1349
0002ec  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1349
                  |L34.750|
0002ee  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]         ;1349
0002f0  4284              CMP      r4,r0                 ;1349
0002f2  f6ffaea5          BLT      |L34.64|
;;;1569                   }
;;;1570               }
;;;1571           }
0002f6  bf00              NOP      
                  |L34.760|
;;;1572           l_u8CheckSum = 0;
0002f8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0002fa  900a              STR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
;;;1573           for(i=0;i<127;i++)
0002fc  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0002fe  e006              B        |L34.782|
                  |L34.768|
;;;1574           {
;;;1575               l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i+0];
000300  5d31              LDRB     r1,[r6,r4]
000302  980a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
000304  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
000306  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
000308  900a              STR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
00030a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1573
00030c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1573
                  |L34.782|
00030e  2c7f              CMP      r4,#0x7f              ;1573
000310  dbf6              BLT      |L34.768|
;;;1576           }
;;;1577           u8pOutEdid[0x7F+0] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
000312  980a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
000314  4240              RSBS     r0,r0,#0
000316  f886007f          STRB     r0,[r6,#0x7f]
;;;1578       }
;;;1579   
;;;1580       return TRUE;
00031a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1581   }
00031c  b00f              ADD      sp,sp,#0x3c
00031e  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
;;;1582   
                          ENDP

000322  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L34.804|
000324  09040700          DCB      "\t",4,"\a",0

                          AREA ||i.mapp_EdidLimitTo4K30||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_EdidLimitTo4K30 PROC
;;;884    ***************************************************/
;;;885    bool mapp_EdidLimitTo4K30(u8 *u8pInEdid,
000000  e92d4fff          PUSH     {r0-r11,lr}
;;;886                                        u8 *u8pOutEdid,
;;;887                                        u16 u16len,
;;;888                                        bool bEnInterlace,
;;;889                                        bool bOnlyPcm20)
;;;890    {
000004  b08f              SUB      sp,sp,#0x3c
000006  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000008  460c              MOV      r4,r1
00000a  469b              MOV      r11,r3
;;;891        u8 i;
;;;892        u8 l_u8CheckSum=0;
00000c  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0
;;;893        uint8_t const l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[18] = //4k@30, 297M
000010  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000012  a1fa              ADR      r1,|L35.1020|
000014  a80a              ADD      r0,sp,#0x28
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;894        {
;;;895            0x04,0x74,0x00,0x30,0xF2,0x70,0x5A,0x80,0xB0,
;;;896            0x58,0x8A,0x00,0x20,0xC2,0x31,0x00,0x00,0x1E,
;;;897        };
;;;898    
;;;899        if(is_edid_valid(u8pInEdid) == FALSE)

000020  b918              CBNZ     r0,|L35.42|
;;;900        {
;;;901            return FALSE;
000022  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L35.36|
;;;902        }
;;;903        memcpy(u8pOutEdid,u8pInEdid,u16len);
;;;904    
;;;905        // block 0
;;;906        #if _CLR_SAMSUN_EDID_SERIAL_NUM
;;;907        if(u8pOutEdid[0x08]==0x4C&&u8pOutEdid[0x09]==0x2D)  // if ID is SAM, Change the ID serial number 00000000
;;;908        {
;;;909            u8pOutEdid[0x0C]=0x00;
;;;910            u8pOutEdid[0x0D]=0x00;
;;;911            u8pOutEdid[0x0E]=0x00;
;;;912            u8pOutEdid[0x0F]=0x00;
;;;913        }
;;;914        #endif
;;;915    
;;;916        if((((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==3840)
;;;917            ||((((u8pOutEdid[0x3A]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x38]))==4096))
;;;918            &&((((u8pOutEdid[0x3D]>>4)<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x3B]))==2160))
;;;919        {
;;;920            if(((u8pOutEdid[0x37]<<8)|(u8pOutEdid[0x36]))>30000)
;;;921            {
;;;922                for(i=0;i<18;i++)
;;;923                {
;;;924                    u8pOutEdid[0x36+i] = l_u8DefaultEdidTiming[i];
;;;925                }
;;;926            }
;;;927        }
;;;928    
;;;929        #if 0
;;;930        for(i=0x49;i<127;i++)
;;;931        {
;;;932            if((u8pOutEdid[i]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+1]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+2]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+3]==0xFD))
;;;933            {
;;;934                if(u8pOutEdid[i+9]>0x1E)
;;;935                {
;;;936                    u8pOutEdid[i+9] = 0x1E;
;;;937                }
;;;938            }
;;;939        }
;;;940        #endif
;;;941    
;;;942    #if _SET_RANGE_LIMITS_BLOCK
;;;943        for(i=0x49;i<127;i++)
;;;944        {
;;;945            if((u8pOutEdid[i]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+1]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+2]==0x00)&&(u8pOutEdid[i+3]==0xFD))
;;;946            {
;;;947                if(u8pOutEdid[i+5]>0x17)
;;;948                {
;;;949                    u8pOutEdid[i+5] = 0x17;
;;;950                }
;;;951                //if(u8pOutEdid[i+6]>0x55)
;;;952                //{
;;;953                //    u8pOutEdid[i+6] = 0x55;
;;;954                //}
;;;955                if(u8pOutEdid[i+7]>0x0F)
;;;956                {
;;;957                    u8pOutEdid[i+7] = 0x0F;
;;;958                }
;;;959                //if(u8pOutEdid[i+8]>0x5C)
;;;960                //{
;;;961                //    u8pOutEdid[i+8] = 0x5C;
;;;962                //}
;;;963                if(u8pOutEdid[i+9]>0x1E)
;;;964                {
;;;965                    u8pOutEdid[i+9] = 0x1E;
;;;966                }
;;;967            }
;;;968        }
;;;969    #endif
;;;970    
;;;971        for(i=0;i<127;i++)
;;;972        {
;;;973            l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i];
;;;974        }
;;;975        u8pOutEdid[0x7F] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
;;;976    
;;;977        // block 1
;;;978        if((u8pOutEdid[0x7E]>0)&&(u16len>128))
;;;979        {
;;;980            if((u8pOutEdid[0x80] == 0x02) && (u8pOutEdid[0x81] == 0x03))
;;;981            {
;;;982                u8 l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;983                u8 j = 0;
;;;984                u8 l_u8Offect = 0;
;;;985                #if _CLR_VIDEO_DATA_BLOCK_6G
;;;986                u8 l_u8VdbId = 0;
;;;987                u8 l_pu8Vdb[31]={0};
;;;988                #endif
;;;989    
;;;990                for(i=4;i<l_u8DataBlockLen;i++)
;;;991                {
;;;992                    l_u8Offect = u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0x1F;
;;;993                    #if _CLR_VIDEO_DATA_BLOCK_6G
;;;994                    if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x40) // video data block
;;;995                    {
;;;996                        for(j=0;j<l_u8Offect;j++)
;;;997                        {
;;;998                            if(bEnInterlace&&((((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]&0x7F)>=96)&&((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]&0x7F)<=97))
;;;999                                ||(((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]&0x7F)>=101)&&((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]&0x7F)<=102))
;;;1000                               ||((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]&0x7F)>=106)))
;;;1001                               continue;
;;;1002   
;;;1003                           if((bEnInterlace==FALSE)&&(((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]>=96)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]<=97))
;;;1004                               ||((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]>=101)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]<=102))
;;;1005                               ||(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j]>=106)))  //  Delete timing up to 4K60
;;;1006                           {
;;;1007                               continue;
;;;1008                           }
;;;1009                           else
;;;1010                           {
;;;1011                               l_pu8Vdb[l_u8VdbId++] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j];
;;;1012                           }
;;;1013                       }
;;;1014                       if(l_u8VdbId != l_u8Offect)
;;;1015                       {
;;;1016                           u8pOutEdid[0x80+i] = (0x40|l_u8VdbId);
;;;1017                           for(j=0;j<l_u8VdbId;j++)
;;;1018                           {
;;;1019                               u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1+j] = l_pu8Vdb[j];
;;;1020                           }
;;;1021                           u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect-l_u8VdbId);
;;;1022                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1023                           for(j=(i+1+l_u8Offect);j<127;j++)
;;;1024                           {
;;;1025                               u8pOutEdid[0x80-(l_u8Offect-l_u8VdbId)+j] = u8pInEdid[0x80+j];
;;;1026                           }
;;;1027                       }
;;;1028                       i += l_u8VdbId;
;;;1029                   }
;;;1030                   else
;;;1031                   #endif
;;;1032                   #if _SET_AUDIO_DATA_BLOCK_LIMIT_PCM20
;;;1033                   if(((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x20)&&(bOnlyPcm20 == TRUE)) // video data block
;;;1034                   {
;;;1035                       u8 l_u8PCMData[] = {0x09,0x04,0x07};
;;;1036                       u8pOutEdid[0x80+i] = ((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0xE0)|0x03);
;;;1037                       for(j=1;j<4;j++)
;;;1038                       {
;;;1039                           u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+j] = l_u8PCMData[j-1];
;;;1040                       }
;;;1041                       for(j=i;j<127;j++)
;;;1042                       {
;;;1043                           if((0x80+j+4)>255)
;;;1044                           {
;;;1045                               break;
;;;1046                           }
;;;1047                           if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1048                           {
;;;1049                               u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+4] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1050                           }
;;;1051                           else
;;;1052                           {
;;;1053                               u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+4] = 0;
;;;1054                           }
;;;1055                       }
;;;1056                       u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect-3);
;;;1057                       l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1058                       i += 3;
;;;1059                   }
;;;1060                   else
;;;1061                   #endif
;;;1062                   #if _CLR_VSDB_HDMI_FORUM_BLOCK
;;;1063                   if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x60)    // vsdb
;;;1064                   {
;;;1065                       // IEEE Registration ID: 0xC45DD8
;;;1066                       if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1] == 0xD8)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+2] == 0x5D)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+3] == 0xC4))      //HDMI FORUM
;;;1067                       {
;;;1068                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete hdmi forum block
;;;1069                           {
;;;1070                               if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1071                               {
;;;1072                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1073                               }
;;;1074                               else
;;;1075                               {
;;;1076                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = 0;
;;;1077                               }
;;;1078                           }
;;;1079                           u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1080                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1081                           i -= 1; // return to previous index
;;;1082                       }
;;;1083                       else if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1] == 0x03)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+2] == 0x0C)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+3] == 0x00))
;;;1084                       {
;;;1085                           if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+7] > 0x3C)) // max Clock > 300 0x3C*5 = 300
;;;1086                           {
;;;1087                               u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+7] = 0x3C;
;;;1088                           }
;;;1089                           i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1090                       }
;;;1091                       else
;;;1092                           i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1093                   }
;;;1094                   else
;;;1095                   #endif
;;;1096                   #if 1
;;;1097                   if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0xE0)    // CTA Data
;;;1098                   {
;;;1099                       #if _CLR_YCBCR420_EDID_BLOCK
;;;1100                       if(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1]==0x0F)      // YCbCr 420 capability map
;;;1101                       {
;;;1102                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete YCbCr 420 capability map
;;;1103                           {
;;;1104                               if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1105                               {
;;;1106                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1107                               }
;;;1108                               else
;;;1109                               {
;;;1110                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = 0;
;;;1111                               }
;;;1112                           }
;;;1113                           u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1114                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1115                           i -= 1;
;;;1116                       }
;;;1117                       else if(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1]==0x0E)     // YCbCr 420 Video data

;;;1119                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete YCbCr 420 Video data
;;;1120                           {
;;;1121                               if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1122                               {
;;;1123                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1124                               }
;;;1125                               else
;;;1126                               {
;;;1127                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = 0;
;;;1128                               }
;;;1129                           }
;;;1130                           u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1131                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1132                           i -= 1;
;;;1133                       }
;;;1134                       else
;;;1135                       #endif
;;;1136                       #if _CLR_HDR_BLOCK
;;;1137                       if(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1]==0x06)     // HDR Static Metadata
;;;1138                       {
;;;1139                           for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete HDR Static Metadata
;;;1140                           {
;;;1141                               if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1142                               {
;;;1143                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1144                               }
;;;1145                               else
;;;1146                               {
;;;1147                                   u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = 0;
;;;1148                               }
;;;1149                           }
;;;1150                           u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1151                           l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1152                           i -= 1;
;;;1153                       }
;;;1154                       else
;;;1155                       #endif //add by wf8421
;;;1156                       #if _SET_DOLBY_VISION_LIMIT_4K30
;;;1157                       if(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1]==0x01)  // dolby vision
;;;1158                       {
;;;1159                           // IEEE Registration ID: 0x00D046
;;;1160                           if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+2] == 0x46)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+3] == 0xD0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+4] == 0x00))
;;;1161                           {
;;;1162                               if(l_u8Offect>6)
;;;1163                               {
;;;1164                                   if(((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+5]&BIT6)==0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+5]&BIT1))
;;;1165                                   {
;;;1166                                       u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+5] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+5]&(~BIT1);    // Remove support 2160p 60Hz
;;;1167                                   }
;;;1168                                   else
;;;1169                                       i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1170                               }
;;;1171                               else
;;;1172                                   i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1173                           }
;;;1174                           else
;;;1175                               i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1176                       }
;;;1177                       else
;;;1178                       #endif
;;;1179                       #if _CLR_DOLBY_VISION_BLOCK
;;;1180                       if(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+1]==0x01)  // dolby vision
;;;1181                       {
;;;1182                           // IEEE Registration ID: 0x00D046
;;;1183                           if((u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+2] == 0x46)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+3] == 0xD0)&&(u8pOutEdid[0x80+i+4] == 0x00))
;;;1184                           {
;;;1185                               for(j=i;j<127;j++)  // Delete dolby vision block
;;;1186                               {
;;;1187                                   if((0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1)<255)
;;;1188                                   {
;;;1189                                       u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = u8pOutEdid[0x80+j+l_u8Offect+1];
;;;1190                                   }
;;;1191                                   else
;;;1192                                   {
;;;1193                                       u8pOutEdid[0x80+j] = 0;
;;;1194                                   }
;;;1195                               }
;;;1196                               u8pOutEdid[0x82] = u8pOutEdid[0x82] - (l_u8Offect)-1;
;;;1197                               l_u8DataBlockLen = u8pOutEdid[0x82];
;;;1198                               i -= 1;
;;;1199                           }
;;;1200                           else
;;;1201                               i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1202                       }
;;;1203                       else
;;;1204                       #endif
;;;1205                           i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1206                   }
;;;1207                   else
;;;1208                   #endif
;;;1209                   {
;;;1210                       i += l_u8Offect;
;;;1211                   }
;;;1212               }
;;;1213           }
;;;1214           l_u8CheckSum = 0;
;;;1215           for(i=0;i<127;i++)
;;;1216           {
;;;1217               l_u8CheckSum += u8pOutEdid[i+0x80];
;;;1218           }
;;;1219           u8pOutEdid[0x7F+0x80] = 0x100-l_u8CheckSum;
;;;1220       }
;;;1221   
;;;1222       return TRUE;
;;;1223   }

                  |L35.114|

                  |L35.158|

                  |L35.176|

                  |L35.180|

                  |L35.192|

                  |L35.210|

000442  f8140f82          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x82]!        ;1130
000446  1bc0              SUBS     r0,r0,r7              ;1130
000448  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;1130
00044a  7020              STRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;1130
00044c  f8140982          LDRB     r0,[r4],#-0x82        ;1131
000450  9009              STR      r0,[sp,#0x24]         ;1131
000452  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1              ;1132
000454  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1132
000456  e004              B        |L35.1122|
                  |L35.1112|
000458  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7              ;1205
00045a  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1205
00045c  e001              B        |L35.1122|
                  |L35.1118|
00045e  19e8              ADDS     r0,r5,r7              ;1210
000460  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1210
                  |L35.1122|
000462  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;990
000464  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;990
                  |L35.1126|
000466  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]         ;990
000468  4285              CMP      r5,r0                 ;990
00046a  f6ffae4a          BLT      |L35.258|
00046e  bf00              NOP                            ;1213
                  |L35.1136|
000470  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0                 ;1214
000474  2500              MOVS     r5,#0                 ;1215
000476  e007              B        |L35.1160|
                  |L35.1144|
000478  f1050080          ADD      r0,r5,#0x80           ;1217
00047c  5c20              LDRB     r0,[r4,r0]            ;1217
00047e  4448              ADD      r0,r0,r9              ;1217
000480  f00009ff          AND      r9,r0,#0xff           ;1217
000484  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;1215
000486  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1215
                  |L35.1160|
000488  2d7f              CMP      r5,#0x7f              ;1215
00048a  dbf5              BLT      |L35.1144|
00048c  f1c90000          RSB      r0,r9,#0              ;1219
000490  f88400ff          STRB     r0,[r4,#0xff]         ;1219
                  |L35.1172|
000494  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1222
000496  e5c5              B        |L35.36|
;;;1224   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_GetEdidPhysicalAddress||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  mapp_GetEdidPhysicalAddress PROC
;;;1708   
;;;1709   u16 mapp_GetEdidPhysicalAddress(u8 *pu8EdidBuf)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1710   {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1711       u8 i;
;;;1712       u16 l_u16PhyAddr = 0;
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1713   
;;;1714       if(pu8EdidBuf[0x7E] != 0)
000006  f892307e          LDRB     r3,[r2,#0x7e]
00000a  b31b              CBZ      r3,|L36.84|
;;;1715       {
;;;1716           for(i=0; i<128;i++)
00000c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00000e  e01e              B        |L36.78|
                  |L36.16|
;;;1717           {
;;;1718               if((pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i]&0xE0)==0x60)
000010  f1010380          ADD      r3,r1,#0x80
000014  5cd3              LDRB     r3,[r2,r3]
000016  f00303e0          AND      r3,r3,#0xe0
00001a  2b60              CMP      r3,#0x60
00001c  d115              BNE      |L36.74|
;;;1719               {
;;;1720                   if((pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i+1]==0x03)
00001e  f1010381          ADD      r3,r1,#0x81
000022  5cd3              LDRB     r3,[r2,r3]
000024  2b03              CMP      r3,#3
000026  d110              BNE      |L36.74|
;;;1721                       &&(pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i+2]==0x0C)
000028  f1010382          ADD      r3,r1,#0x82
00002c  5cd3              LDRB     r3,[r2,r3]
00002e  2b0c              CMP      r3,#0xc
000030  d10b              BNE      |L36.74|
;;;1722                       &&(pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i+3]==0x00))
000032  f1010383          ADD      r3,r1,#0x83
000036  5cd3              LDRB     r3,[r2,r3]
000038  b93b              CBNZ     r3,|L36.74|
;;;1723                   {
;;;1724                       l_u16PhyAddr = (pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i+4]<<8)|(pu8EdidBuf[0x80+i+5]);
00003a  f1010385          ADD      r3,r1,#0x85
00003e  5cd4              LDRB     r4,[r2,r3]
000040  1e5b              SUBS     r3,r3,#1
000042  5cd3              LDRB     r3,[r2,r3]
000044  ea442003          ORR      r0,r4,r3,LSL #8
;;;1725                       break;
000048  e003              B        |L36.82|
                  |L36.74|
00004a  1c4b              ADDS     r3,r1,#1              ;1716
00004c  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3                 ;1716
                  |L36.78|
00004e  2980              CMP      r1,#0x80              ;1716
000050  dbde              BLT      |L36.16|
                  |L36.82|
000052  bf00              NOP      
                  |L36.84|
;;;1726                   }
;;;1727               }
;;;1728           }
;;;1729       }
;;;1730       return l_u16PhyAddr;
;;;1731   }
000054  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1732   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_RevisionMake||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_RevisionMake PROC
;;;2144   
;;;2145   void mapp_RevisionMake(void)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;2146   {
;;;2147       u16 l_u16Year;
;;;2148       u8  l_u8Month;
;;;2149       u8  l_u8Date;
;;;2150       u8  l_u8Hour;
;;;2151       u8  l_u8minute;
;;;2152       u8  l_u8Second;
;;;2153   
;;;2154       switch(DataStr[2])      //月份字符转成日期数字，先判断第三个字幕，再判断第二个字幕，获取月份
000004  485a              LDR      r0,|L37.368|
000006  7880              LDRB     r0,[r0,#2]  ; DataStr
000008  2870              CMP      r0,#0x70
00000a  d030              BEQ      |L37.110|
00000c  dc0c              BGT      |L37.40|
00000e  2867              CMP      r0,#0x67
000010  d02b              BEQ      |L37.106|
000012  dc04              BGT      |L37.30|
000014  2862              CMP      r0,#0x62
000016  d019              BEQ      |L37.76|
000018  2863              CMP      r0,#0x63
00001a  d130              BNE      |L37.126|
00001c  e02d              B        |L37.122|
                  |L37.30|
00001e  286c              CMP      r0,#0x6c
000020  d021              BEQ      |L37.102|
000022  286e              CMP      r0,#0x6e
000024  d12b              BNE      |L37.126|
000026  e008              B        |L37.58|
                  |L37.40|
000028  2872              CMP      r0,#0x72
00002a  d011              BEQ      |L37.80|
00002c  2874              CMP      r0,#0x74
00002e  d020              BEQ      |L37.114|
000030  2876              CMP      r0,#0x76
000032  d020              BEQ      |L37.118|
000034  2879              CMP      r0,#0x79
000036  d122              BNE      |L37.126|
000038  e013              B        |L37.98|
                  |L37.58|
;;;2155       {
;;;2156           case 'n':   // Jan / Jun
;;;2157               {
;;;2158                   l_u8Month = DataStr[1] == 'a' ? 1 : 6;
00003a  484d              LDR      r0,|L37.368|
00003c  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]  ; DataStr
00003e  2861              CMP      r0,#0x61
000040  d101              BNE      |L37.70|
000042  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000044  e000              B        |L37.72|
                  |L37.70|
000046  2006              MOVS     r0,#6
                  |L37.72|
000048  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;2159               }
;;;2160               break;
00004a  e018              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.76|
;;;2161           case 'b':   // Feb
;;;2162               {
;;;2163                   l_u8Month = 2;
00004c  2402              MOVS     r4,#2
;;;2164               }
;;;2165               break;
00004e  e016              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.80|
;;;2166           case 'r':   // Mar / Apr
;;;2167               {
;;;2168                   l_u8Month = DataStr[1] == 'a' ? 3 : 4;
000050  4847              LDR      r0,|L37.368|
000052  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]  ; DataStr
000054  2861              CMP      r0,#0x61
000056  d101              BNE      |L37.92|
000058  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00005a  e000              B        |L37.94|
                  |L37.92|
00005c  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
                  |L37.94|
00005e  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;2169               }
;;;2170               break;
000060  e00d              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.98|
;;;2171           case 'y':   // May
;;;2172               {
;;;2173                   l_u8Month = 5;
000062  2405              MOVS     r4,#5
;;;2174               }
;;;2175               break;
000064  e00b              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.102|
;;;2176           case 'l':   // Jul
;;;2177               {
;;;2178                   l_u8Month = 7;
000066  2407              MOVS     r4,#7
;;;2179               }
;;;2180               break;
000068  e009              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.106|
;;;2181           case 'g':   // Aug
;;;2182               {
;;;2183                   l_u8Month = 8;
00006a  2408              MOVS     r4,#8
;;;2184               }
;;;2185               break;
00006c  e007              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.110|
;;;2186           case 'p':   // Sep
;;;2187               {
;;;2188                   l_u8Month = 9;
00006e  2409              MOVS     r4,#9
;;;2189               }
;;;2190               break;
000070  e005              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.114|
;;;2191           case 't':   // Oct
;;;2192               {
;;;2193                   l_u8Month = 10;
000072  240a              MOVS     r4,#0xa
;;;2194               }
;;;2195               break;
000074  e003              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.118|
;;;2196           case 'v':   // Nov
;;;2197               {
;;;2198                   l_u8Month = 11;
000076  240b              MOVS     r4,#0xb
;;;2199               }
;;;2200               break;
000078  e001              B        |L37.126|
                  |L37.122|
;;;2201           case 'c':   // Dec
;;;2202               {
;;;2203                   l_u8Month = 12;
00007a  240c              MOVS     r4,#0xc
;;;2204               }
;;;2205               break;
00007c  bf00              NOP      
                  |L37.126|
00007e  bf00              NOP                            ;2160
;;;2206       }
;;;2207   
;;;2208       l_u16Year = HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[7],0)*1000
000080  493b              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
000082  79c8              LDRB     r0,[r1,#7]  ; DataStr
000084  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000086  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00008a  f44f717a          MOV      r1,#0x3e8
00008e  fb00fa01          MUL      r10,r0,r1
000092  4937              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
000094  7a08              LDRB     r0,[r1,#8]  ; DataStr
000096  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000098  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00009c  eb0001c0          ADD      r1,r0,r0,LSL #3
0000a0  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
0000a4  eb0a0a80          ADD      r10,r10,r0,LSL #2
0000a8  4931              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
0000aa  7a48              LDRB     r0,[r1,#9]  ; DataStr
0000ac  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000ae  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
0000b2  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
0000b6  eb0a0a40          ADD      r10,r10,r0,LSL #1
0000ba  492d              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
0000bc  7a88              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0xa]  ; DataStr
0000be  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
0000c4  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
0000c6  b285              UXTH     r5,r0
;;;2209                   +HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[8],0)*100
;;;2210                   +HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[9],0)*10
;;;2211                   +HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[10],0);
;;;2212       l_u8Date = ((DataStr[4]!=' ')?(HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[4],0)*10):0)
0000c8  4829              LDR      r0,|L37.368|
0000ca  7900              LDRB     r0,[r0,#4]  ; DataStr
0000cc  2820              CMP      r0,#0x20
0000ce  d009              BEQ      |L37.228|
0000d0  4927              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
0000d2  7908              LDRB     r0,[r1,#4]  ; DataStr
0000d4  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000d6  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
0000da  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
0000de  ea4f0a40          LSL      r10,r0,#1
0000e2  e001              B        |L37.232|
                  |L37.228|
0000e4  f04f0a00          MOV      r10,#0
                  |L37.232|
0000e8  4921              LDR      r1,|L37.368|
0000ea  7948              LDRB     r0,[r1,#5]  ; DataStr
0000ec  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000ee  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
0000f2  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
0000f4  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0
;;;2213                   +HexAndAsciiChange(DataStr[5],0);
;;;2214   
;;;2215       l_u8Hour = HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[0],0)*10
0000f6  491f              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
0000f8  7848              LDRB     r0,[r1,#1]  ; TimeStr
0000fa  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000fc  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
000100  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000102  491c              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
000104  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]  ; TimeStr
000106  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000108  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00010c  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
000110  eb0a0040          ADD      r0,r10,r0,LSL #1
000114  b2c7              UXTB     r7,r0
;;;2216                   +HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[1],0);
;;;2217       l_u8minute = HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[3],0)*10
000116  4917              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
000118  7908              LDRB     r0,[r1,#4]  ; TimeStr
00011a  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00011c  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
000120  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000122  4914              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
000124  78c8              LDRB     r0,[r1,#3]  ; TimeStr
000126  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000128  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00012c  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
000130  eb0a0040          ADD      r0,r10,r0,LSL #1
000134  f00008ff          AND      r8,r0,#0xff
;;;2218                   +HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[4],0);
;;;2219       l_u8Second = HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[6],0)*10
000138  490e              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
00013a  79c8              LDRB     r0,[r1,#7]  ; TimeStr
00013c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00013e  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
000142  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000144  490b              LDR      r1,|L37.372|
000146  7988              LDRB     r0,[r1,#6]  ; TimeStr
000148  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00014a  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00014e  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
000152  eb0a0040          ADD      r0,r10,r0,LSL #1
000156  f00009ff          AND      r9,r0,#0xff
;;;2220                   +HexAndAsciiChange(TimeStr[7],0);
;;;2221   
;;;2222       g_stTestVersion.u16Year  = l_u16Year;
00015a  4807              LDR      r0,|L37.376|
00015c  8005              STRH     r5,[r0,#0]
;;;2223       g_stTestVersion.u8Month  = l_u8Month;
00015e  7084              STRB     r4,[r0,#2]
;;;2224       g_stTestVersion.u8Date   = l_u8Date;
000160  70c6              STRB     r6,[r0,#3]
;;;2225       g_stTestVersion.u8Hour   = l_u8Hour;
000162  7107              STRB     r7,[r0,#4]
;;;2226       g_stTestVersion.u8minute = l_u8minute;
000164  f8808005          STRB     r8,[r0,#5]
;;;2227       g_stTestVersion.u8Second = l_u8Second;
000168  f8809006          STRB     r9,[r0,#6]
;;;2228   }
00016c  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;2229   
                          ENDP

                  |L37.368|
                          DCD      DataStr
                  |L37.372|
                          DCD      TimeStr
                  |L37.376|
                          DCD      g_stTestVersion

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataEdidIndexCheck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataEdidIndexCheck PROC
;;;654    
;;;655    bool mapp_UserDataEdidIndexCheck(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;656    {
;;;657        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000004  4d0a              LDR      r5,|L38.48|
;;;658        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000006  462e              MOV      r6,r5
;;;659        pstEdidSelIndex_t           pstEdidIndex = &pstPrjSaveVar->stEdidSelIndex;
000008  f106040b          ADD      r4,r6,#0xb
;;;660        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;661        bool l_bState = TRUE;
00000c  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;662    
;;;663        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex, ((uint8_t *)&pstEdidIndex->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstEdidIndex));
000010  1d60              ADDS     r0,r4,#5
000012  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00001a  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;664        if(l_u8CheckSum != pstEdidIndex->u8CheckSum)
00001c  7960              LDRB     r0,[r4,#5]
00001e  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
000020  d003              BEQ      |L38.42|
;;;665        {
;;;666            mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit
;;;667            #if (_EN_EEPROM_FUN_SAVE_SYS_EDID_INDEX==_MACRO_ENABLE)
;;;668            SetUserData_EdidIndexSave();
;;;669            #endif
;;;670            l_bState = FALSE;
000026  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
                  |L38.42|
;;;671        }
;;;672    
;;;673        return l_bState;
00002a  4640              MOV      r0,r8
;;;674    }
00002c  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;675    
                          ENDP

                  |L38.48|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit PROC
;;;625    #else
;;;626    void mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit(void)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;627    {
;;;628        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4908              LDR      r1,|L39.36|
;;;629        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;630        pstEdidSelIndex_t           pstEdidIndex = &pstPrjSaveVar->stEdidSelIndex;
000006  f103020b          ADD      r2,r3,#0xb
;;;631    
;;;632        pstEdidIndex->u8EdidFlashIndex = Def_UserEdidMode;
00000a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000c  7010              STRB     r0,[r2,#0]
;;;633    
;;;634        #if _ENABLE_SAVE_CURRENT_EDID
;;;635        if(System_Default_Edid_table == NULL)
;;;636        {
;;;637            //System_Default_Edid_table = (iTE_u8 *)AllPrjDefEdidTabl;
;;;638            memcpy(pstEdidIndex->u8CurEdidbuf, AllPrjDefEdidTabl,256);
;;;639        }
;;;640        else
;;;641        {
;;;642            memcpy(pstEdidIndex->u8CurEdidbuf, System_Default_Edid_table,256);
;;;643        }
;;;644        #endif
;;;645        #if _ENABLE_EDID_SWITCH_A_SINGLE_CHANNEL
;;;646        {
;;;647            u8 i;
;;;648            for(i=0;i<_HDMI_INPUT_PORT_USED_NUMBER;i++)
00000e  bf00              NOP      
000010  e004              B        |L39.28|
                  |L39.18|
;;;649                pstEdidIndex->u8EdidChannelMode[i] = Def_UserEdidMode;
000012  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000014  1c54              ADDS     r4,r2,#1
000016  5425              STRB     r5,[r4,r0]
000018  1c44              ADDS     r4,r0,#1              ;648
00001a  b2e0              UXTB     r0,r4                 ;648
                  |L39.28|
00001c  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;648
00001e  dbf8              BLT      |L39.18|
;;;650        }
;;;651        #endif
;;;652    }
000020  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;653    #endif //add by wf8421
                          ENDP

000022  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L39.36|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataHdcpAutoSave||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataHdcpAutoSave PROC
;;;420    
;;;421    bool mapp_UserDataHdcpAutoSave(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;422    {
;;;423        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000004  4d0c              LDR      r5,|L40.56|
;;;424        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000006  462f              MOV      r7,r5
;;;425        pstHdcpStatusOutPort_t      pstHdcpStatusOp = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdcpStatusOp;
000008  f1070409          ADD      r4,r7,#9
;;;426        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;427        bool l_bState = TRUE;
00000c  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;428    
;;;429        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp,((uint8_t *)&pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp));
000010  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
000012  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00001a  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;430        if(l_u8CheckSum != pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum)
00001c  7860              LDRB     r0,[r4,#1]
00001e  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000020  d006              BEQ      |L40.48|
;;;431        {
;;;432            SetUserData_HDCP();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_HDCP
;;;433            pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum = l_u8CheckSum;
000026  7066              STRB     r6,[r4,#1]
;;;434            SetUserData_HDCP();
000028  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_HDCP
;;;435            l_bState = FALSE;
00002c  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
                  |L40.48|
;;;436        }
;;;437    
;;;438        return l_bState;
000030  4640              MOV      r0,r8
;;;439    }
000032  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;440    
                          ENDP

000036  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L40.56|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataHdcpCheck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataHdcpCheck PROC
;;;386    
;;;387    bool mapp_UserDataHdcpCheck(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;388    {
;;;389        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000004  4d0c              LDR      r5,|L41.56|
;;;390        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000006  462f              MOV      r7,r5
;;;391        pstHdcpStatusOutPort_t      pstHdcpStatusOp = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdcpStatusOp;
000008  f1070409          ADD      r4,r7,#9
;;;392        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;393        bool l_bState = TRUE;
00000c  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;394    
;;;395        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp,((uint8_t *)&pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdcpStatusOp));

000012  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00001a  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;396        if(l_u8CheckSum != pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum)
00001c  7860              LDRB     r0,[r4,#1]
00001e  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000020  d006              BEQ      |L41.48|
;;;397        {
;;;398            mapp_UserDataHdcpInit();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserDataHdcpInit
;;;399            pstHdcpStatusOp->u8CheckSum = l_u8CheckSum;
000026  7066              STRB     r6,[r4,#1]
;;;400            SetUserData_HDCP();
000028  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_HDCP
;;;401            l_bState = FALSE;
00002c  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
                  |L41.48|
;;;402        }
;;;403

;;;405    }

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataHdcpInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataHdcpInit PROC
;;;374    
;;;375    void mapp_UserDataHdcpInit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;376    {
;;;377        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4906              LDR      r1,|L42.28|
;;;378        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;379        pstHdcpStatusOutPort_t      pstHdcpStatusOp = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdcpStatusOp;
000006  f1030209          ADD      r2,r3,#9
;;;380        u8 l_u8Index;
;;;381        for(l_u8Index = 0;l_u8Index <_HDMI_O_PORT_NUM; l_u8Index++)
00000a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000c  e003              B        |L42.22|
                  |L42.14|
;;;382        {
;;;383            pstHdcpStatusOp->u8HdcpSta[l_u8Index] = Def_OutputHdcpMode;
00000e  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000010  5414              STRB     r4,[r2,r0]
000012  1c44              ADDS     r4,r0,#1              ;381
000014  b2e0              UXTB     r0,r4                 ;381
                  |L42.22|
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;381
000018  dbf9              BLT      |L42.14|
;;;384        }
;;;385    }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;386    
                          ENDP

                  |L42.28|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserDataProjectNameCheck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserDataProjectNameCheck PROC
;;;701    
;;;702    bool mapp_UserDataProjectNameCheck(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;703    {
;;;704        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000004  4d0c              LDR      r5,|L43.56|
;;;705        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000006  462f              MOV      r7,r5
;;;706        pstProjectNameSet_t         pstPrjNameSet = &pstPrjSaveVar->stPrjNameSet;
000008  f1070411          ADD      r4,r7,#0x11
;;;707        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;708        bool l_bState = TRUE;
00000c  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;709    
;;;710        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet, ((uint8_t *)&pstPrjNameSet->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstPrjNameSet));
000010  f104003d          ADD      r0,r4,#0x3d
000014  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
000016  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000018  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00001c  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;711        if(l_u8CheckSum != pstPrjNameSet->u8CheckSum)
00001e  f894003d          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x3d]
000022  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000024  d005              BEQ      |L43.50|
;;;712        {
;;;713            pstPrjNameSet->u8CheckSum = l_u8CheckSum;
000026  f884603d          STRB     r6,[r4,#0x3d]
;;;714            mapp_UserDataProjectNameInit();
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserDataProjectNameInit
;;;715            l_bState = FALSE;
00002e  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
                  |L43.50|
;;;716        }
;;;717    
;;;718        return l_bState;
000032  4640              MOV      r0,r8
;;;719    }
000034  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;720    
                          ENDP

                  |L43.56|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                  mapp_UserData_HdmiSelAutoSave PROC
;;;359    
;;;360    void mapp_UserData_HdmiSelAutoSave(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;361    {
;;;362        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;

;;;363        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;

;;;364        pstHdmiSwitchParam_t        pstHdmiSw = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdmiSel;
000008  4635              MOV      r5,r6
;;;365        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;366        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw,((uint8_t *)&pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw));

000012  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000016  4607              MOV      r7,r0

000018  7a28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#8]
00001a  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
00001c  d002              BEQ      |L45.36|
;;;368        {
;;;369            SetUserData_HdmiSel();
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_HdmiSel
;;;370            pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum = l_u8CheckSum;

                  |L45.36|
;;;371    
;;;372        }
;;;373    }
000024  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;374

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserData_HdmiSelCheck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserData_HdmiSelCheck PROC
;;;307    
;;;308    bool mapp_UserData_HdmiSelCheck(void)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;309    {
;;;310        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000004  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L46.52|
;;;311        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000006  4626              MOV      r6,r4
;;;312        pstHdmiSwitchParam_t        pstHdmiSw = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdmiSel;
000008  4635              MOV      r5,r6
;;;313        u8 l_u8CheckSum;
;;;314        bool l_bState = TRUE;
00000a  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;315        l_u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw,((uint8_t *)&pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum - (uint8_t *)pstHdmiSw));
00000e  f1050008          ADD      r0,r5,#8
000012  1b41              SUBS     r1,r0,r5
000014  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000016  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00001a  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;316        if(l_u8CheckSum!= pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum)
00001c  7a28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#8]
00001e  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
000020  d004              BEQ      |L46.44|
;;;317        {
;;;318            mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit
;;;319            pstHdmiSw->u8CheckSum = l_u8CheckSum;
000026  722f              STRB     r7,[r5,#8]
;;;320    
;;;321            l_bState = FALSE;
000028  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
                  |L46.44|
;;;322        }
;;;323    
;;;324        return l_bState;
00002c  4640              MOV      r0,r8
;;;325    }
00002e  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;326    
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L46.52|
