                          AREA ||i.mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit PROC
;;;286    
;;;287    void mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;288    {
;;;289        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000002  4907              LDR      r1,|L47.32|
;;;290        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
000004  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;291        pstHdmiSwitchParam_t        pstHdmiSw = &pstPrjSaveVar->stHdmiSel;
000006  461a              MOV      r2,r3
;;;292        #if _ENABLE_MULTI_OUTPUT_CHIP
;;;293        u8 l_u8index;
;;;294        #endif
;;;295    
;;;296        #if _ENABLE_MULTI_OUTPUT_CHIP
;;;297        for(l_u8index=0;l_u8index<Def_outport_num;l_u8index++)
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  e005              B        |L47.24|
                  |L47.12|
;;;298        {
;;;299            pstHdmiSw->bAutoSwitch[l_u8index] = Def_AutoSwitchMode;   //auto switch mode
00000c  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
00000e  5414              STRB     r4,[r2,r0]
;;;300            pstHdmiSw->u8SwChannel[l_u8index] = l_u8index/*Def_DefaultChannel*/;      //the first channel
000010  1d14              ADDS     r4,r2,#4
000012  5420              STRB     r0,[r4,r0]
000014  1c44              ADDS     r4,r0,#1              ;297
000016  b2e0              UXTB     r0,r4                 ;297
                  |L47.24|
000018  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;297
00001a  dbf7              BLT      |L47.12|
;;;301        }
;;;302        #else
;;;303        pstHdmiSw->bAutoSwitch = Def_AutoSwitchMode;//auto switch mode
;;;304        pstHdmiSw->u8SwChannel = Def_DefaultChannel;//the first channel
;;;305        #endif
;;;306    }
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;307    
                          ENDP

00001e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L47.32|
                          DCD      g_stPrjGloVar

                          AREA ||i.my_CaseStrStr||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  my_CaseStrStr PROC
;;;1983   
;;;1984   char *my_CaseStrStr(char *inBuffer,char *inSerchStr)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1985   {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;1986       char *pCurrBuffer = inBuffer;
000008  463c              MOV      r4,r7
;;;1987       while(*pCurrBuffer != '\0')
00000a  e014              B        |L48.54|
                  |L48.12|
;;;1988       {
;;;1989           char *pCompareOne = pCurrBuffer;
00000c  4625              MOV      r5,r4
;;;1990           char *pCompareTow = inSerchStr;
00000e  4646              MOV      r6,r8
;;;1991           while(tolower(*pCompareOne) == tolower(*pCompareTow))
000010  e006              B        |L48.32|
                  |L48.18|
;;;1992           {
;;;1993               pCompareOne++;
000012  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
;;;1994               pCompareTow++;
000014  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
;;;1995               if(*pCompareTow == '\0')
000016  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
000018  b910              CBNZ     r0,|L48.32|
;;;1996               {
;;;1997                   return (char*)pCompareOne;
00001a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
                  |L48.28|
;;;1998               }
;;;1999           }
;;;2000           pCurrBuffer++;
;;;2001       }
;;;2002       return NULL;
;;;2003   }
00001c  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
                  |L48.32|
000020  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]            ;1991
000022  f7fffffe          BL       tolower
000026  4681              MOV      r9,r0                 ;1991
000028  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]            ;1991
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       tolower
00002e  4581              CMP      r9,r0                 ;1991
000030  d0ef              BEQ      |L48.18|
000032  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;2000
000034  bf00              NOP                            ;2001
                  |L48.54|
000036  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;1987
000038  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1987
00003a  d1e7              BNE      |L48.12|
00003c  bf00              NOP                            ;2002
00003e  e7ed              B        |L48.28|
;;;2004   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.my_StrStr||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  my_StrStr PROC
;;;1949   #else
;;;1950   char *my_StrStr(char *inBuffer,char *inSerchStr)//参照strstr函数原型构建自己的strstr函数
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1951   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1952   	char*s1 = NULL;//创建一个空指针；
000006  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;1953   	char*s2 = NULL;
000008  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
;;;1954   	char*cur = inBuffer;
00000a  462b              MOV      r3,r5
;;;1955   	if (*inSerchStr == '\0')
00000c  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]
00000e  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L49.20|
;;;1956   	{
;;;1957   		return (char*)inBuffer;                    //如果我们所要找的子串inSerchStr为'\0',返回总串的首元素地址
000010  4628              MOV      r0,r5
                  |L49.18|
;;;1958   	}
;;;1959   
;;;1960   	while (*cur)//cur代表指向的是子串第一次出现的首元素地址
;;;1961   	{
;;;1962   		s1 = cur;                      //把cur指向字符串的首元素地址赋给s1
;;;1963   		s2 = (char*)inSerchStr;                    //把inSerchStr指向的首元素地址赋给s2，每一次循环都要从inSerchStr的首元素地址开始重新比较
;;;1964   		while ((*s1 != 0) && (*s2 != 0) && *s1 == *s2)           //只有在s1指向的首元素地址，s2指向的首元素地址都不为'\0'的时候，才可以在总串中找子串的首地址第一次出现的时候
;;;1965   		{                                            // 比较s1，s2指向的地址所对应的字符是否相等，若相等，各自指向的地址向后跳一个字节比较下一位是否相等在满足以上的条件下不断循环，若不满足，
;;;1966   			s1++;                                    //开始一下比较
;;;1967   			s2++;
;;;1968   		}
;;;1969   		if (*s2 == '\0')             //若经过上面的比较，s2指向的内容恰好是'\0',代表找到子串首次出现的地址
;;;1970   		{                              //若不满足以上情况的比较，开始以下比较
;;;1971   			return (char*)cur;
;;;1972   		}
;;;1973   		if (*s1 == '\0')
;;;1974   		{
;;;1975   			return NULL;            //若在s2指向的内容不为'\0'时，s1指向的内容率先为0，代表总串长度比子串长度短，必不存在子串，返回一个空指针
;;;1976   		}
;;;1977   		cur++;//代表当前cur指向的并不是子串第一次出现的首元素地址，指向的地址要往后跳一个字节
;;;1978   	}
;;;1979   
;;;1980   	return NULL;//如果经过以上比较都不能得出结果，代表找不到子串，要返回空指针
;;;1981   }
000012  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L49.20|
000014  e015              B        |L49.66|
                  |L49.22|
000016  4619              MOV      r1,r3                 ;1962
000018  4622              MOV      r2,r4                 ;1963
00001a  e001              B        |L49.32|
                  |L49.28|
00001c  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1              ;1966
00001e  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;1967
                  |L49.32|
000020  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]            ;1964
000022  b128              CBZ      r0,|L49.48|
000024  7810              LDRB     r0,[r2,#0]            ;1964
000026  b118              CBZ      r0,|L49.48|
000028  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]            ;1964
00002a  7816              LDRB     r6,[r2,#0]            ;1964
00002c  42b0              CMP      r0,r6                 ;1964
00002e  d0f5              BEQ      |L49.28|
                  |L49.48|
000030  7810              LDRB     r0,[r2,#0]            ;1969
000032  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L49.56|
000034  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;1971
000036  e7ec              B        |L49.18|
                  |L49.56|
000038  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]            ;1973
00003a  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L49.64|
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1975
00003e  e7e8              B        |L49.18|
                  |L49.64|
000040  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;1977
                  |L49.66|
000042  7818              LDRB     r0,[r3,#0]            ;1960
000044  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1960
000046  d1e6              BNE      |L49.22|
000048  bf00              NOP                            ;1980
00004a  e7e2              B        |L49.18|
;;;1982   #endif
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||.bss||, DATA, NOINIT, ALIGN=2

                  g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer
                          %        256
                  g_u8SingleChannelEdidBuffer
                          %        1024
                  gTimerCounters
                          %        16
